Jump Pad.name: Jump Pad
Jump Pad.description:
You create a bouncy surface in a case de 1,5 mètre on a surface within range. When you cast the power, you can designate creatures that can safely use the jump pad. For the duration, whenever a creature you haven't chosen enters the affected area, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be launched 10 mètres upwards, and 5 mètres horizontally in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a [[/r d8]] and assign a direction to each die face.

While a creature you have chosen (or a creature that has succeeded its Dexterity jet de sauvegarde) is in the area, it can use its réaction to jump with the aid of the bouncy surface. The creature's jump distance for this jump is multiplied by 5.

Scramble Interface.name: Scramble Interface
Scramble Interface.description:
You choose one droid or construct you can see within range and scramble its ability to differentiate targets. La cible must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. If the construct has the 'Piloted' trait, and has a pilot controlling it that is not incapacitated, it gains a bonus to the jet de sauvegarde equal to the pilot's Intelligence modificateur. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible loses the ability to distinguish friend from foe, regarding all creatures it can see as enemies until the power ends. Each time la cible takes dégâts, it can repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Whenever the affected creature chooses another creature as a target, it must choose la cible at random from among la créatures it can see within range of the attack, power, or other ability it's using. If an enemy provokes an attaque d'opportunité from the affected creature, la créature must make that attack if it is able to.

Truth Serum.name: Truth Serum
Truth Serum.description:
You administer a poison to a creature you contacted that prevents it from telling lies. The creature contacted must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, nothing happens. On a failure, la créature can't speak a deliberate lie until the power ends.

An affected creature is aware of the power and can thus avoid answering questions to which it would normally respond with a lie. Such a creature can be evasive in its answers as long as it remains within the boundaries of the truth.

Transposition.name: Transposition
Transposition.description:
Another creature you can see within range has its form shimmer in a holographic configuration before collapsing. La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (la cible can choose to fail), or la cible is teleported to an unoccupied space de votre choix that you can see within range. The chosen space must be on a surface or in a liquid that can support la cible without la cible having to squeeze.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the range of the power increases by 30 mètres for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Vortex Shot.name: Vortex Shot
Vortex Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and each Large or smaller creature within 10 mètres of la cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be pulled to the nearest unoccupied space adjacent to la cible.

This power deals additional dégâts when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque à distance deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts. This dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] again at niveau 11 and niveau 17. The dégâts is the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

Electroshock.name: Electroshock
Electroshock.description:
Lightning springs from you to deliver a shock to a creature you try to contact. Make a melee tech attack against la cible. You have avantage on the attack roll if la cible is made of metal or wearing armor made of metal. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the start of its next turn.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Greater Salvo.name: Greater Salvo
Greater Salvo.description:
You launch four projectiles at points you can see within range. Each creature within a 20-foot-radius sphere of each point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 15d6]] fire dégâts and [[/r 15d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature in the area of more than one fiery burst is affected only once.

The power dégâtss objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

Cryogenic Storm.name: Cryogenic Storm
Cryogenic Storm.description:
A storm of cryogenic energy encompasses the ground in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range. Each creature in the cylinder must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d8]] kinetic dégâts and [[/r 4d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

The storm's area of effect becomes difficult terrain jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 5 or higher, the kinetic dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Warp Strike.name: Warp Strike
Warp Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you can teleport to an unoccupied space de votre choix within 10 mètres of you. If you teleport to a space within 5 mètres of la cible, la cible cannot take réactions until the end of its next turn.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] energy dégâts to la cible. This extra energy dégâts increases to [[/r 2d6]] at niveau 11 and [[/r 3d6]] at niveau 17.

Toxin Scan.name: Toxin Scan
Toxin Scan.description: For the duration, you can see the presence and location of poisons and diseases within 30 mètres of you. You also identify the kind of poison or disease in each case.

Vertical Maneuvering.name: Vertical Maneuvering
Vertical Maneuvering.description: If you cast this power as a réaction, your fall is stopped, and you remain aloft. For the duration, as long as you are within 30 mètres of a solid surface, you have a flying speed of 40 mètres. De plus, you can't be knocked à terre, and you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes made against effects that would push you or pull you. When the power ends, you are gently lowered to the ground, if you are within 30 mètres of it.

Haywire.name: Haywire
Haywire.description:
You momentarily surround a creature you can see within range with electronic interference and holographic illusions. La cible must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde, or it takes [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts and moves 5 mètres in a random direction if it can move and its speed is at least 5 mètres. Roll a [[/r d4]] for the direction: 1, north; 2, south; 3, east; or 4, west. This movement doesn't provoke attaque d'opportunités, and if the direction rolled is blocked, la cible doesn't move.

The power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Overload.name: Overload
Overload.description:
You expel a burst of power. Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts and is pushed 10 mètres away from you. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts and isn't pushed.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Instant Translocation.name: Instant Translocation
Instant Translocation.description:
Your form shimmers in a holographic configuration and collapses as an attack begins to hit you. You have a +5 bonus to AC against the triggering attack. As part of the same réaction, you can then teleport to an unoccupied space within 30 mètres of you, and can make one attaque d'arme with avantage against the attacker.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the maximum teleport distance increases by 10 for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Targeting Shot.name: Targeting Shot
Targeting Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and a small target only visible to you marks it. The next attack roll you make against la créature before the end of your next turn can't suffer from disavantage.

This power deals additional dégâts when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque à distance deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts. This dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] again at niveau 11 and niveau 17. The dégâts is the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

Energy Shield.name: Energy Shield
Energy Shield.description: Vous créez rapidement un bouclier énergétique. Jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, vous disposez d'un bonus de +5 à la CA. Cela inclut l’attaque déclenchante.

Echo Blast.name: Echo Blast
Echo Blast.description:
You emit a reverberating pulse of sound at a target within range. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d8]] sonic dégâts.

This power can hit multiple targets in succession when you reach higher niveaus: two targets at niveau 5, three targets at niveau 11, and four targets at niveau 17. Each target must be within 30 mètres of the previous target, and the last target must be no further than 30 mètres away from you. You can not target the same creature twice in succession.

Cryogenic Suspension.name: Cryogenic Suspension
Cryogenic Suspension.description:
Choose up to six creatures de votre choix in a 40-foot cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be affected by this power for the duration.

An affected target gains 1 slowed niveau, it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes, and it can't use réactions. On its turn, it can use either an action or a action bonus, not both. Regardless of la créature's abilities or items, it can't make more than one melee or attaque à distance during its turn.

If la créature attempts to cast a power with a casting time of 1 action, roll a [[/r d20]]. On an 11 or higher, the power doesn't take effect until la créature's next turn, and la créature must use its action on that turn to complete the power. If it can't, the power is wasted.

A creature affected by this power makes another Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of its turn. On a successful sauvegarde, the effect ends for it.

Pressure Crush.name: Pressure Crush
Pressure Crush.description:
You attempt to crush the body of a creature you contact. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. If la créature is agrippé or entravé by you or an effect you control, it makes the jet de sauvegarde with disavantage. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d12]] kinetic dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d12]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d12]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d12]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d12]]).

Incendiary Cloud.name: Incendiary Cloud
Incendiary Cloud.description:
You create a swirling cloud of smoke shot through with white-hot embers in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range. The cloud spreads around corners and is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.

When the cloud appears, chaque créature in it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature must also make this jet de sauvegarde when it enters the power's area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there.

The cloud moves 10 mètres directly away from you in a direction that you choose at the start of each of your turns.

Diminish Tech.name: Diminish Tech
Diminish Tech.description:
Choose une créature, object, or tech effect within range. Any pouvoir technique of niveau 3 or lower on la cible ends. For each pouvoir technique of niveau 4 or higher on la cible, make an test de caractéristique using your techcasting ability. The DD equals 10 + the power's niveau. On a success, the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, you automatically end the effects of a pouvoir technique on la cible if the power's niveau is equal to or less than the niveau of the tech slot you used.

Mutate/Augment.name: Mutate/Augment
Mutate/Augment.description:
You alter your body with tech, temporarily gaining new properties which last for the duration. You can select three of the following properties. You cannot select a property more than once, unless that property says otherwise.

  • Your body becomes more flexible. You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes against effects that would grapple or restrain you, and your movement is unaffected by difficult terrain or squeezing.
  • You grow one additional appendage. This appendage serves as an arm and a hand, though it can take the shape of a limb, tentacle, or similar appendage. You can select this property twice to grow a maximum number of two appendages. You can only gain the benefit of items held by two of your arms at any given time, and once per round you can switch which arms you are benefiting from (no action required).
  • You sprout antennae that give you tremorsense out to a range of 30 mètres.
  • You extend the length of your limbs. When you make a attaque au corps à corps or attempt to grapple, shove, or trip a creature on your turn, your reach for it is 5 mètres greater than normal.
  • You gain a burrowing speed equal to your walking speed.
  • Your flesh hardens. Your AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor you're wearing.
  • You can gain the benefits of any one option of the alter personnelle power. You can select this property multiple times to gain the benefits of multiple options of the alter personnelle power, choosing a different option each time.
  • You gain the effect of the magnetic hold power, but you can affix to and move along any surface, instead of only metallic surfaces. You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.
  • You can gain any one effect of the force enlightenment power.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, you can select an additional property for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Project Hologram.name: Project Hologram
Project Hologram.description:
You create an illusory copy of yourpersonnelle that lasts for the duration. The copy can appear at any location within range that you have seen before, regardless of intervening obstacles. The illusion looks and sounds like you but is intangible. If the illusion takes any dégâts, it disappears, and the power ends.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour move this illusion up to twice your speed, and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose. It mimics your mannerisms perfectly.

You can see through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were in its space. On your turn as a action bonus, you can switch from using its senses to using your own, or back again. While you are using its senses, you are aveuglé and assourdi in regard to your own surroundings.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A creature that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, la créature can see through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to la créature.

Scan Area.name: Scan Area
Scan Area.description:
Program a creature or object that you are familiar with into your tech focus. Using a sonar scan, the tech focus attempts to find a path to la créature's or objects location, as long as cette créature or object is within 1,000 mètres of you. If la créature or object is moving, you know the direction of its movement.

The power can locate a specific creature or object known to you, or the nearest creature/object of a specific kind (such as a droid or a bothan), so long as you have seen such a creature up close—within 30 mètres—at least once.

Acid Wind.name: Acid Wind
Acid Wind.description:
You produce a breeze full of stinging acid droplets. Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] acid dégâts and is aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts and isn't aveuglé.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Mass Repair Droid.name: Mass Repair Droid
Mass Repair Droid.description:
Choose up to six droids or constructs in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point. Each target regains points de vie equal to [[/r 3d8]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. This power only affects droids and constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Wire Bind.name: Wire Bind
Wire Bind.description:
You produce up to 4 wires, which bind creatures de votre choix that you can see within range. A creature can be targeted by more than one wire.

Each target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde for each wire cette cibles it. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is entravé and falls à terre as it is wrapped securely by the wire.

A creature entravé by a wire can use its action to make a Strength or test de Dextérité (its choice) against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a success, it is no longer entravé by that wire. A wire can also be destroyed; each one has AC 15 and 10 points de vie, and has immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons.

A wire that misses its target or is escaped falls slack and disintegrates, as do all remaining wires when the power ends.

Greater Translation Program.name: Greater Translation Program
Greater Translation Program.description: This power grants la créature you contact the ability to understand any spoken registered language it hears. Moreover, when la cible speaks, any creature that knows at least one registered language and can hear la cible understands what it says.

Disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
Disintegrate.description:
A blast of corrosive energy emits from you. Choose a target within range.

A creature targeted by this power must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 10d6 + 40]] acid dégâts. If this dégâts reduces la cible to 0 points de vie, it is disintegrated.

A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

This power automatically disintegrates an unenhanced Large or smaller object. If la cible is a Huge or larger object, this power disintegrates a 10-foot-cube portion of it.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 7 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 3d6]] for each slot niveau above 6th.

Execute Command.name: Execute Command
Execute Command.description:
You dictate a one-word command to a droid or construct you can see within range. La cible must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde or follow the command on its next turn. If the construct has the 'Piloted' trait, and has a pilot controlling it that is not incapacitated, it gains a bonus to the jet de sauvegarde equal to the pilot's Intelligence modificateur. Some typical commands and their effects follow. You might issue a command other than one described here. If you do so, the GM determines how la cible behaves. If la cible can't follow your command, the power ends.

Approach. La cible moves toward you by the shortest and most direct route, ending its turn if it moves within 5 mètres of you.

Deactivate. La cible falls à terre and then ends its turn.

Drop. La cible drops whatever it is holding and then ends its turn.

Flee. La cible spends its turn moving away from you by the fastest available means.

Halt. La cible doesn't move and takes no actions. A flying target stays aloft, provided that it is able to do so. If it must move to stay aloft, it flies the minimum distance needed to remain in the air.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can affect one additional droid or construct for each slot niveau above 1st. The creatures must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Copy.name: Copy
Copy.description: Cette puissance crée une copie parfaite de toutes les données écrites, dessinées ou numériques, visuelles, audio ou textuelles que vous contactez sur un datapad ou une datacard que vous fournissez. Vous pouvez copier jusqu'à 10 pages de texte ou 10 minutes de données visuelles ou audio avec une seule utilisation de ce pouvoir. Les documents améliorés, tels que les datacrons, les plans ou les documents cryptés, ne peuvent pas être copiés avec ce pouvoir.

Time Bomb.name: Time Bomb
Time Bomb.description:
Make a melee tech attack against a target you contact. On a miss, this power ends. En cas de contacter, you deal [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts as you plant an explosive charge on la cible's body. You can then detonate the charge as a action bonus, which ends this power. It deals [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts if detonated on the same turn. It deals [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on your next turn, increasing by [[/r 1d8]] for each round you do not detonate it, to a maximum of [[/r 6d8]]. If this power ends before you detonate the charge, la cible takes no fire dégâts.

A creature affected by this power can use an action to attempt to remove the detonator from its person, making a Strength or test de Dextérité (la créature chooses the ability to use) against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a success, this power ends, as the detonator deactivates harmlessly.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the kinetic dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Cryogenic Burst.name: Cryogenic Burst
Cryogenic Burst.description:
You emit a burst of cold energy at a creature within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, it takes [[/r 1d8]] cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

The power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Acid Splash.name: Acid Splash
Acid Splash.description:
You emit a burst of acid. Choose une créature within range that you can see, or choose two creatures within range that are within 5 mètres of each other that you can see. A target must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d6]] acid dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Programmed Illusion.name: Programmed Illusion
Programmed Illusion.description:
You create an illusion of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon within range that activates when a specific condition occurs. The illusion is imperceptible until then. It must be no larger than a 30-foot cube, and you decide when you cast the power how the illusion behaves and what sounds it makes. This scripted performance can last up to 5 minutes.

When the condition you specify occurs, the illusion springs into existence and performs in the manner you described. Once the illusion finishes performing, it disappears and remains dormant for 10 minutes. After this time, the illusion can be activated again.

The triggering condition can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur within 30 mètres of the area. For example, you could create an illusion of yourpersonnelle to appear and warn off others who attempt to open a trapped door, or you could set the illusion to trigger only when a creature says the correct word or phrase.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A creature that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, la créature can see through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to la créature.

Aid Droid.name: Aid Droid
Aid Droid.description:
Choose one droid or construct that you can see within range. La cible can immediately use its réaction to regain points de vie equal to [[/r 1d6]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Mislead.name: Mislead
Mislead.description:
You become invisible at the same time that an illusory double of you appears where you are standing. The double lasts for the duration, but the invisibility ends if you attack or cast a power.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour move your illusory double up to twice your speed and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose.

You can see through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were located where it is. On each of your turns as a action bonus, you can switch from using its senses to using your own, or back again. While you are using its senses, you are aveuglé and assourdi in regard to your own surroundings.

Infiltrate.name: Infiltrate
Infiltrate.description:
La créature

A que vous contactez devient invisible. Tout ce que transporte la cible est invisible tant qu'il se trouve sur la cible. Le pouvoir prend fin si la cible attaque, lance un pouvoir ou effectue une action hostile.

Overcharge Tech. Vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 2e.

Greater Energy Shield.name: Greater Energy Shield
Greater Energy Shield.description: An energy shield appears and protects la cible. Until the start of la cible's next turn, la cible has a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and la cible takes no dégâts from homing rockets.

Synchronicity.name: Synchronicity
Synchronicity.description:
A creature you contact isn't inconvenienced by mundane delays. Traffic lights are always green, there's always a waiting elevator, and a taxi is always around the corner. La cible can run at full speed through dense crowds and attacks of opportunity provoked by la cible's movement are made with disavantage.

The power also grants avantage to stealth checks, since cover is always available. De plus, la cible has avantage on all test de caractéristiques made to drive a vehicle.

If two or more creatures under the effect of the power are attempting to avoid being inconvenienced by each other, la créatures make test de Charismes each time the effects would oppose each other. The higher check of the two's power takes effect.

Kolto Cloud.name: Kolto Cloud
Kolto Cloud.description:
As you expel kolto, up to six creatures de votre choix that you can see within range regain points de vie equal to [[/r 1d4]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Radiation.name: Radiation
Radiation.description:
Dim, greenish light spreads within a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The light spreads around corners, and it lasts until the power ends.

When a creature moves into the power's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, cette créature must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 4d10]] necrotic dégâts, and it suffers one niveau of épuisement and emits a dim, greenish light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre. This light makes it impossible for la créature to benefit from being invisible. The light and any niveaus of épuisement caused by this power go away when the power ends.

Irradiate.name: Irradiate
Irradiate.description:
A surge of radiation washes over a creature within range. The creature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 3d10]] necrotic dégâts and suffers one niveau of épuisement, which lasts for the duration. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes half as much dégâts and does not suffer a niveau of épuisement. A creature exhausted by this power can make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a successful sauvegarde, the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Corrosive Sphere.name: Corrosive Sphere
Corrosive Sphere.description:
You create a globule of acid and hurl it at a point within range, where it explodes in a 20-foot-radius sphere. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 10d4]] acid dégâts and another [[/r 5d4]] acid dégâts at the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half the initial dégâts and no dégâts at the end of its next turn.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 5 or higher, the initial dégâts increases by [[/r 2d4]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Flash.name: Flash
Flash.description:
You create a massive flash of light and explosion of sound at a point within range. Roll [[/r 6d10]]; the total is how many points de vie of creatures this power can affect. Creatures within 20 mètres of the point are affected in ascending order of their current points de vie (ignoring inconscient creatures).

Starting with la créature that has the lowest current points de vie, chaque créature affected by this power is aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. Subtract chaque créature's points de vie from the total before moving on to la créature with the next lowest points de vie. A creature's points de vie must be equal to or less than the remaining total for cette créature to be affected.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, roll an additional [[/r 2d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Assess the Situation.name: Évaluer la situation
Assess the Situation.description:
Vous prenez un instantané sensoriel d'une cible à portée. Votre technologie vous donne un bref aperçu des défenses de la cible. Vous avez l'avantage au prochain jet d'attaque que vous effectuez contre la cible avant la fin de votre prochain tour.

Ce pouvoir bénéficie d'attaques supplémentaires aux niveaux supérieurs : deux attaques au niveau 5, trois attaques au niveau 11 et quatre attaques au niveau 17.

Electrical Burst.name: Electrical Burst
Electrical Burst.description:
You emit a burst of electricity. Each creature within range, other than you, must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Gleaming Outline.name: Gleaming Outline
Gleaming Outline.description:
Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light (your choice). Any creature in the area when the power is cast is also outlined in light if it fails a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. For the duration, objects and affected creatures shed dim light in a rayon de 3 mètres.

Any attack roll against an affected creature or object has avantage if the attacker can see it, and the affected creature or object can't benefit from being invisible.

Short Circuit.name: Short Circuit
Short Circuit.description:
You electrocute a creature within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la créature. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts. If la cible is a droid, construct, or has a tech focus, it has disavantage on the first attack roll it makes against you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Ring of Fire.name: Ring of Fire
Ring of Fire.description:
A wall of flames erupts out of the ground in a ring around you with a radius of 15 mètres and a height of 10 mètres. Creatures who start their turn in the ring of fire or pass through it on their turn take [[/r 1d6]] fire dégâts. Creatures within the ring of fire who willingly try to move through the fire to escape must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to do so. Creatures who are immune to fear or fire automatically succeed on this jet de sauvegarde.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts of the ring of fire increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Concealed Caltrops.name: Concealed Caltrops
Concealed Caltrops.description:
You scatter a large number of caltrops across ground in a rayon de 6 mètres centered on a point within range. These caltrops pierce deep into the mètres and boots of anyone who walks upon them. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes [[/r 2d4]] kinetic dégâts for every 5 mètres it travels.

The caltrops are nearly invisible to the naked eye. Any creature that can't see the area at the time the power is cast must make a Wisdom (Perception) check against your tech sauvegarde DD to notice the caltrops before entering the area.

Delayed Detonator.name: Delayed Detonator
Delayed Detonator.description:
Choose a point you can see within range. You launch a detonator at that point, which remains there jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, when it explodes, ending the power. You can also use your réaction at any point during the power's duration to cause the detonator to explode early. When the detonator explodes, chaque créature within 5 mètres of the point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts and [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can launch an additional detonator at another point you can see within range for each slot niveau above 1st. The detonators all explode simultaneously. A creature in the area of more than one detonator when they explode is only affected once.

Explosion.name: Explosion
Explosion.description:
You create an explosion at a point within range. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A target takes [[/r 8d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Sonic Strike.name: Sonic Strike
Sonic Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you begin to emanate a disturbing hum. If a hostile creature ends its turn within 5 mètres of you before the start of your next turn, it takes [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] sonic dégâts to la cible, and the secondary dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] and [[/r 1d4]], respectively, at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Predictive AI.name: Predictive AI
Predictive AI.description:
You contact a willing creature, granting them a limited AI companion that can predict the world around them. For the duration, la cible can't be surprised and has avantage on attack rolls, test de caractéristiques, and jet de sauvegardes. De plus, other creatures have disavantage on attack rolls against la cible for the duration.

This power immediately ends if you cast it again before its duration ends.

Adrenaline.name: Adrenaline
Adrenaline.description: You infuse une créature within range with a jittery burst of power, speeding its senses and réactions to the point of near precognition. The creature makes its initiative check with avantage.

Illusory Terrain.name: Illusory Terrain
Illusory Terrain.description:
Vous faites en sorte que le terrain dans un cube de 150 pieds de portée ressemble, sonne et sente comme n'importe quel autre type de terrain.

Les caractéristiques tactiles du terrain sont inchangées, donc les créatures entrant dans la zone sont susceptibles de voir à travers l'illusion. Si la différence n'est pas évidente au contact, une créature examinant attentivement l'illusion peut tenter un test d'Intelligence (Enquête) contre votre sauvegarde technologique DD pour ne pas y croire. Une créature qui discerne l'illusion pour ce qu'elle est, la voit comme une vague image superposée au terrain.

Target Lock.name: Verrouillage de la cible
Target Lock.description:
You choose a creature you can see within range and mark it as your quarry. Until the power ends, you deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts to la cible whenever you hit it with a attaque d'arme, la cible gains no benefit from one-quarter, half, and three-quarters cover against you, and if la cible is invisible, you can see it as if it were visible. If la cible drops to 0 points de vie before this power ends, you can use a action bonus on a subsequent turn of yours to mark a new creature.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of 3rd or niveau 4, you can maintain your concentration on the power for up to 8 hours. When you use a tech slot of niveau 5 or higher, you can maintain your concentration on the power for up to 24 hours.

Greater Sabotage Charges.name: Greater Sabotage Charges
Greater Sabotage Charges.description:
You create six medium sabotage charges that last for the power's duration. When you cast the power, and as a action bonus on subsequent turns, you can hurl up to two of the charges to points you choose within 120 mètres. Each charge explodes if it reaches the point or hits a solid surface. Each creature within 10 mètres of the explosion must make a Dexterity sauvegarde. The explosion deals [[/r 4d6]] fire dégâts on a failure, or half dégâts on a success.

Overcharge Tech. The number of charges created increases by two for each slot niveau above 7th.

Toxin Purge.name: Toxin Purge
Toxin Purge.description:
You contact a creature. If it is empoisonné or diseased, you neutralize the poison or disease. If more than one poison or disease afflicts la cible, you neutralize one poison or disease that you know is present, or you neutralize one at random.

For the duration, la cible has avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being empoisonné or diseased, and it has resistance to poison dégâts.

Delayed Explosion.name: Delayed Explosion
Delayed Explosion.description:
You create a delayed explosion at a point within range. When the power ends, either because your concentration is broken or because you decide to end it, the explosion occurs. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes fire dégâts equal to the total accumulated dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

The power's base dégâts is [[/r 12d6]]. If at the end of your turn the explosion has not yet occurred, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]].

If the explosion is contacted before the interval has expired, la créature contacting it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, the power ends immediately, causing the explosion.

The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 8 or higher, the base dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 7th.

Alter Self.name: Alter Self
Alter Self.description:
You alter your form with tech. When you cast the power, choose one of the following options, the effects of which last for the duration of the power. While the power lasts, you can end one option as an action to gain the benefits of a different one.

Aquatic Adaptation. You adapt your body to an aquatic environment. You can breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

Change Appearance. You transform your appearance. You decide what you look like, including your height, weight, facial features, sound of your voice, hair length, coloration, and distinguishing characteristics, if any. Vous pouvez faire yourpersonnelle appear as a member of another species (an organic species cannot appear as a droid, or vice versa), though none of your statistics change. You can also alter your vocal cords, enabling you to speak a language you know, but otherwise would be incapable of speaking. You also can't appear as a creature of a different size than you, and your basic shape stays the same; if you're bipedal, you can't use this power to become quadrupedal, for instance. At any time for the duration of the power, you can use your action to change your appearance in this way again.

Natural Weapons. You grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or a different natural weapon de votre choix. Your dégâts die for your unarmed strikes increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]). Your unarmed strikes are considered enhanced and you have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with them.

Enhance Droid.name: Enhance Droid
Enhance Droid.description:
You contact a droid or construct and upgrade one of its aspects. Choose one of the following effects; la cible gains that effect until the power ends.

  • Servomotor. La cible has avantage on test de Forces, and its carrying capacity doubles.
  • Motivator. La cible has avantage on test de Dextérités. It also doesn't take dégâts from falling 20 mètres or less if it isn't incapacitated.
  • Power Core. La cible has avantage on test de Constitutions. It also gains [[/r 2d6]] points de vie temporaires, which are lost when the power ends.
  • Databanks. La cible has avantage on test d'Intelligences.
  • Sensors. La cible has avantage on test de Sagesses.
  • Relations Protocols. La cible has avantage on test de Charismes.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional droid or construct for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Frequency Scan.name: Frequency Scan
Frequency Scan.description:
For the duration, you can detect electronic transmissions. When you cast the power and as your action on each turn until the power ends, you can focus on any une créature that you can see within 30 mètres of you. If la créature you choose does not possess a commlink, or is not a droid or construct, la créature is unaffected.

If la créature possesses a commlink or other communications device, you receive any transmissions it broadcasts or receives for the duration.

De plus, if la cible is a droid or construct, you can read its "thoughts." You initially learn the surface thoughts of la créature—what is most on its mind in that moment. As an action, you can either shift your attention to another creature's thoughts or attempt to probe deeper into the same creature's mind. If you probe deeper, la cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, you gain insight into its reasoning (if any), and something that looms large in its mind (such as its current objectives). If it succeeds, the power ends. Either way, la cible (or its pilot, if it has one) knows that you are probing into its mind, and unless you shift your attention to another creature's thoughts, la créature can use its action on its turn to make an test d'Intelligence contested by your test d'Intelligence; if it succeeds, the power ends.

Questions verbally directed at la cible creature naturally shape the course of its thoughts, so this power is particularly effective as part of an interrogation.

You can also use this power to detect the presence of droids, constructs, or creatures bearing communications devices you can't see. When you cast the power or as your action during the duration, you can search for transmissions within 30 mètres of you. The power can penetrate barriers, but 2 mètres of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead blocks you.

Once you detect the presence of a creature in this way, you can read its thoughts or transmissions for the rest of the duration as described above, even if you can't see it, but it must still be within range.

Tracer Bolt.name: Tracer Bolt
Tracer Bolt.description:
A flash of light streaks toward a creature de votre choix within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 4d6]] energy dégâts, and the next attack roll made against this target before the end of your next turn has avantage.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Cryogenic Blow.name: Cryogenic Blow
Cryogenic Blow.description:
The next time you hit a creature with a attaque d'arme during this power's duration, the attack deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] cold dégâts to la cible. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it gains a niveau of slowed for the duration. At the start of each of its turns, la cible can repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Overcharge Tech. If you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Friendly Fire.name: Friendly Fire
Friendly Fire.description:
You scramble la cibleing protocols of nearby machines. Each droid or construct in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. If a construct has the 'Piloted' trait, and has a pilot controlling it that is not incapacitated, it gains a bonus to the jet de sauvegarde equal to the pilot's Intelligence modificateur. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible loses the ability to distinguish friend from foe, regarding all creatures it can see as enemies until the power ends. Each time la cible takes dégâts, it can repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Whenever the affected creature chooses another creature as a target, it must choose la cible at random from among la créatures it can see within range of the attack, power, or other ability it—s using. If an enemy provokes an attaque d'opportunité from the affected creature, la créature must make that attack if it is able to.

Poison Spray.name: Poison Spray
Poison Spray.description:
You extend your hand toward a creature you can see within range and project a puff of noxious gas. The creature must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d12]] poison dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d12]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d12]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d12]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d12]]).

Tune-up.name: Tune-up
Tune-up.description:
Up to six droids or constructs de votre choix that you can see within range each regain points de vie equal to [[/r 2d8]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Temporary Boost.name: Temporary Boost
Temporary Boost.description:
You contact one willing creature. Once before the power ends, la cible can roll a [[/r d4]] and add the number rolled to one test de caractéristique of its choice. The power then ends.

This power's die increases at higher niveaus: to a [[/r d6]] at niveau 5, a [[/r d8]] at niveau 11, and a [[/r d10]] at niveau 17.

Rewrite Memory.name: Rewrite Memory
Rewrite Memory.description:
You attempt to alter a droid or construct's memories. One droid or construct that you can see must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. If you are fighting la créature, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible becomes charmé by you for the duration. The charmé target is incapacitated and unaware of its surroundings, though it can still hear you. If it takes any dégâts or is targeted by another power, this power ends, and none of la cible's memories are modified.

While this charm lasts, you can affect la cible's memory of an event that it experienced within the last 24 hours and that lasted no more than 10 minutes. You can permanently eliminate all memory of the event, allow la cible to recall the event with perfect clarity and exacting detail, change its memory of the details of the event, or create a memory of some other event.

La cible's mind fills in any gaps in the altered memory. If the power ends before you have finished prescribing the modified memories, la créature's memory isn't altered. Otherwise, the modified memories take hold when the power ends.

A modified memory doesn't necessarily affect how la cible behaves, particularly if the memory contradicts la cible's core programming, alignment, or beliefs. An illogical modified memory, such as implanting a memory of how much la cible enjoyed dousing itpersonnelle in acid, is dismissed, perhaps as a glitch. The DM might deem a modified memory too nonsensical to affect a target in a significant manner.

A remove virus or similar power cast on la cible restores its true memory.

Overcharge Tech. If you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, you can alter la cible's memories of an event that took place up to 7 days ago (niveau 6), 30 days ago (niveau 7), 1 year ago (niveau 8), or any time in la créature's past (niveau 9).

Paralyze Humanoid.name: Paralyze Humanoid
Paralyze Humanoid.description:
You emit a paralyzing dart at a humanoid that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be empoisonné for the duration. While empoisonné in this way, la cible is paralysé. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional humanoid for each slot niveau above 2nd. The humanoids must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Holographic Disguise.name: Holographic Disguise
Holographic Disguise.description:
Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir ou jusqu'à ce que vous utilisiez une action pour le renvoyer, vous pouvez déguiser votre personnel grâce à l'utilisation d'un émetteur d'hologramme. Vous pouvez paraître plus petit ou plus grand d’environ un pied et modifier l’apparence de votre poids, mais vous ne pouvez pas modifier la structure de base de votre corps. L'hologramme peut inclure vos vêtements, armures, armes et autres effets personnels.

L'illusion est uniquement visuelle, donc tout type de contact physique n'interagira qu'avec votre taille et votre forme réelles. Une créature peut utiliser son action pour effectuer un test d'Intelligence (Enquête) par rapport à votre sauvegarde technologique DD, voyant à travers l'hologramme en cas de succès.

Cryogenic Blast.name: Cryogenic Blast
Cryogenic Blast.description:
You release a shard of cryogenic energy at une créature within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts. Hit or miss, the shard then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres of it must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the cold dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Jump.name: Jump
Jump.description: Vous contactez une créature. La distance de saut de la créature est triplée jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir.

Carbonite Explosion.name: Carbonite Explosion
Carbonite Explosion.description:
You generate an explosion of cryogenic energy in a 60-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you can see

within range. Each creature in the affected area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 8d6 + 20]] cold dégâts and is entravé pendant 1 minute as it is encased in carbonite. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half dégâts and is entravé until the end of its next turn.

As an action, a entravé creature can make a test de Force against your tech sauvegarde DD, ending this effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

A creature reduced to 0 points de vie by this power dies instantly, as its body shatters into frozen chunks.

Find the Path.name: Trouver le chemin
Find the Path.description:
Ce pouvoir calcule l'itinéraire physique le plus court et le plus direct vers un emplacement fixe spécifique que vous connaissez sur la même planète. Si vous nommez une destination qui se déplace (comme une forteresse mobile), ou une destination qui n'est pas spécifique (comme "un repaire du Soleil Noir"), le pouvoir tombe en panne.

Pour la durée, tant que vous êtes sur la même planète que la destination, vous savez à quelle distance elle se trouve et dans quelle direction elle se trouve. Pendant que vous y voyagez, chaque fois qu'un choix de chemins vous est proposé en cours de route, vous déterminez automatiquement quel chemin est l'itinéraire le plus court et le plus direct (mais pas nécessairement l'itinéraire le plus sûr) vers la destination.

Repair Droid.name: Repair Droid
Repair Droid.description:
A droid or construct you contact regains a number of points de vie equal to [[/r 1d8]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Ionic Strike.name: Ionic Strike
Ionic Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes wreathed in an ionic discharge. If la cible willingly takes a réaction before the start of your next turn, it immediately takes [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts, and the power ends.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for taking réactions increases to [[/r 2d6]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d6]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Darkvision.name: Darkvision
Darkvision.description: You contact a willing creature to grant it the ability to see in the dark. For the duration, cette créature has darkvision out to a range of 60 mètres.

Magnetic Hold.name: Magnetic Hold
Magnetic Hold.description: Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, une créature volontaire que vous contactez acquiert la capacité de l'attacher personnellement et de se déplacer le long de n'importe quelle surface métallique. Il peut se déplacer de haut en bas et sur des surfaces verticales et à l'envers le long des plafonds, tout en laissant les mains libres, à sa vitesse de marche normale.

Neurotoxin.name: Neurotoxin
Neurotoxin.description:
You release a series of darts filled with neurotoxin. Choose any number of creatures you can see within range. Each creature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature suffers an effect based on its current points de vie:

  • 60 points de vie or fewer: empoisonné pendant 1 minute
  • 50 points de vie or fewer: empoisonné and assourdi pendant 1 minute
  • 40 points de vie or fewer: empoisonné, assourdi, and aveuglé for 10 minutes
  • 30 points de vie or fewer: empoisonné, aveuglé, assourdi, and étourdi for 1 hour
  • 20 points de vie or fewer: killed instantly

This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Tactical Superiority.name: Tactical Superiority
Tactical Superiority.description:
Choisissez jusqu'à deux créatures volontaires que vous pouvez voir à portée. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, la vitesse de chaque cible est doublée, elle gagne un bonus de +2 à la CA, elle a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité, et elle gagne une action supplémentaire à chacun de ses tours. Cette action ne peut être utilisée que pour effectuer l'action Attaque (une seule attaque d'arme), Se précipiter, Se désengager, Se cacher ou Utiliser un objet.

Lorsque le pouvoir prend fin, chaque cible ne peut plus bouger ou entreprendre d'actions avant son prochain tour, alors qu'une vague de léthargie la balaye.

Surcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement technologique de De niveau 8 ou supérieur, vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 7.

Carbon Fog.name: Carbon Fog
Carbon Fog.description: You create a cloud of icy fog in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you can see. The sphere extends around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The fog is semi-solid, and its area is considered difficult terrain. Each creature that enters the power's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes [[/r 4d6]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its turn. The fog lasts for the duration of the power or until it's dispersed by a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 mph).

Poison Dart.name: Poison Dart
Poison Dart.description:
Make a ranged tech attack against a creature within range. On hit, la cible takes [[/r 2d8]] poison dégâts and must make a Constitution sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is also empoisonné jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Destroy Tech.name: Destroy Tech
Destroy Tech.description:
Make a ranged tech attack against a creature within range. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 4d8]] ion dégâts. De plus, if la cible has tech points, it must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it loses 5 tech points, as though it expended a tech slot.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power with a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the ion dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]], and the amount of tech points lost increases by 1 for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Smoke Cloud.name: Smoke Cloud
Smoke Cloud.description:
You cause thick smoke to erupt from a point within range, filling a 20-foot-radius sphere. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the radius of the smoke cloud increases by 20 mètres for each slot niveau above 1st.

Flaming Shots.name: Flaming Shots
Flaming Shots.description:
You channel pouvoir technique through a blaster weapon you are wielding. When a target takes dégâts from the chosen weapon, la cible takes an extra [[/r 1d6]] fire dégâts. The power ends when twelve shots have been fired.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the number of shots you can take with this power increases by two for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Carbonite.name: Carbonite
Carbonite.description:
You attempt to freeze une créature that you can see within range into carbonite. The creature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is entravé as its flesh begins to harden. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature isn't affected.

A creature entravé by this power must make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully sauvegardes against this power three times, the power ends. If it fails its sauvegardes three times, it is turned to stone and subjected to the pétrifié condition for the duration. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until la cible collects three of a kind.

If la créature is physically broken while frozen in carbonite, it suffers from similar deformities if it reverts to its original state.

If you maintain your concentration on this power for the entire possible duration, la créature is frozen in carbonite until the effect is removed.

Immolate.name: Immolate
Immolate.description:
Flames wreathe une créature you can see within range. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 8d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible also burns for the power's duration. The burning target sheds bright light in a rayon de 9 mètres and dim light for an additional 30 mètres. At the end of each of its turns, la cible repeats the jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 4d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, and the power ends on a successful one. These enhanced flames can't be extinguished by unenhanced means.

If dégâts from this power kills a target, la cible is turned to ash.

Mirror Image.name: Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
Three illusory duplicates of yourpersonnelle appear in your space. Until the power ends, the duplicates move with you and mimic your actions, shifting position so it's impossible to track which image is real. Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour dismiss the illusory duplicates.

Each time a creature targets you with an attack during the power's duration, roll a [[/r d20]] to determine whether the attack instead targets one of your duplicates.

If you have three duplicates, you must roll a 6 or higher to change the attack's target to a duplicate. With two duplicates, you must roll an 8 or higher. With one duplicate, you must roll an 11 or higher.

A duplicate's AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modificateur. If an attack hits a duplicate, the duplicate is destroyed. A duplicate can be destroyed only by an attack that hits it. It ignores all other dégâts and effects. The power ends when all three duplicates are destroyed.

A creature is unaffected by this power if it can't see, if it relies on senses other than sight, such as blindsight, or if it can perceive illusions as false, as with truesight.

Minor Defibrillation.name: Minor Defibrillation
Minor Defibrillation.description:
You generate a static charge that can aid or harm a creature you contact. Make a melee tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d10]] lightning dégâts. If la cible is a living creature that has 0 points de vie, it immediately gains one death jet de sauvegarde success instead of taking dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d10]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d10]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d10]]).

Cryogenic Spray.name: Cryogenic Spray
Cryogenic Spray.description:
A blast of cold air erupts from you. Each creature in a cône de 18 mètres must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 8d8]] cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half as much dégâts and isn't slowed.

A creature killed by this power becomes frozen in carbonite.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Acid Dart.name: Acid Dart
Acid Dart.description:
A shimmering green dart streaks toward a target within range and bursts in a spray of acid. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 4d4]] acid dégâts immediately and [[/r 2d4]] acid dégâts at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the dart splashes la cible with acid for half as much of the initial dégâts and no dégâts at the end of its next turn.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts (both initial and later) increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Paralyze Creature.name: Créature paralysante
Paralyze Creature.description:
You emit a paralyzing dart at a creature that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be empoisonné for the duration. While empoisonné in this way, la cible is paralysé. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 5th. The creatures must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Motivator Boost.name: Motivator Boost
Motivator Boost.description:
Vous confèrez à un droïde volontaire une vitesse et une maniabilité accrues. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, la vitesse de la cible est doublée, elle gagne un bonus de +2 à la CA, et elle a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité.

Overcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement technologique de niveau 3 ou supérieur, vous pouvez cibler un droïde supplémentaire pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 2e.

Bacta Pack.name: Bacta Pack
Bacta Pack.description:
You create a luminescent pack of bacta in any space, occupied or unoccupied, within range. The pack remains in its space until it is activated by any creature you choose. If the space you choose is occupied by a creature you have designated, it can use its réaction to immediately activate the pack; otherwise, a creature within 5 mètres of the pack can use a action bonus to contact it and activate it.

When the pack is activated by a designated creature, cette créature regains points de vie equal to [[/r 1d6]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique, and the pack is consumed. If the power ends before the pack has been activated, it becomes useless and disintegrates. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you may either increase the healing of a single pack by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st, or create another pack in a separate space, with one additional pack for each slot niveau above 1st.

Sonic Shot.name: Sonic Shot
Sonic Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes wreathed in a sonic barrier jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If la cible willingly moves before then, it immediately takes sonic dégâts equal to your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique, becomes assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and the power ends.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque à distance deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] sonic dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for moving increases to [[/r 1d6]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. Both jet de dégâtss increase by an additional [[/r 1d6]] at niveaux 11 et 17.

Greater Light.name: Greater Light
Greater Light.description:
A 60-foot-radius sphere of light spreads from a point you choose. The sphere is bright light and sheds dim light for an additional 60 mètres.

If you chose an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from and moves with the object. Completely covering the object with something opaque blocks the light.

If any of this power's area overlaps with enhanced darkness made by a power of niveau 3 or lower, the darkness is dispelled.

Pheromone Burst.name: Pheromone Burst
Pheromone Burst.description:
You expel a burst of mood-altering pheromones around you. Each creature within range other than you must succeed on a Charisma jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] poison dégâts and become effrayé of you until the start of its next turn. A creature that is immune to the empoisonné condition is not effrayé.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d4]]).

Kolto Pack.name: Kolto Pack
Kolto Pack.description:
A creature de votre choix that you can see within range regains points de vie equal to [[/r 1d4]] + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Barrage.name: Barrage
Barrage.description:
You launch [[/r 4d6]] tiny projectiles at up to four creatures you can see within range. The projectiles can be divided between la cibles as desired. Each target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A target takes 1 kinetic dégâts per projectile, or half as much dégâts on a successful sauvegarde.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you launch an additional [[/r 1d6]] projectiles and can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 1st.

Venomous Strike.name: Venomous Strike
Venomous Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and if you were hidden from it, it takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] poison dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] poison dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes when you are hidden from it increases to [[/r 2d4]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] and [[/r 1d4]], respectively, at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Cage.name: Cage
Cage.description:
An immobile, invisible, cube-shaped prison composed of energy springs into existence around an area you choose within range. The prison can be a cage or a solid box as you choose.

A prison in the shape of a cage can be up to 20 mètres on a side and is made from 1/2-inch diameter bars spaced 1/2 inch apart.

A prison in the shape of a box can be up to 10 mètres on a side, creating a solid barrier that prevents any matter from passing through it and blocking any powers cast into or out of the area.

When you cast the power, any creature that is completely inside the cage's area is trapped. Creatures only partially within the area, or those too large to fit inside the area, are pushed away from the center of the area until they are completely outside the area.

A creature inside the cage can't leave it by unenhanced means. If la créature tries to teleport to leave the cage, it must first make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a success, la créature can use that power to exit the cage. On a failure, la créature can't exit the cage and wastes the use of the power or effect.

This power can't be dispelled.

On/Off.name: On/Off
On/Off.description:
Ce pouvoir vous permet d'activer ou de désactiver n'importe quel appareil électronique à portée, à condition que l'appareil ne soit pas utilisé par une créature, et qu'il dispose d'une fonction marche/arrêt clairement définie et facilement accessible depuis l'extérieur de l'appareil. Tout appareil nécessitant une séquence d'arrêt logicielle pour être activé ou désactivé ne peut pas être affecté par on/off.

.

Dismantle.name: Dismantle
Dismantle.description:
You break or tear an unenhanced structure or object you contact that is not being worn or carried by a creature other than you. The break or tear can be up to 1 foot in any dimension. When cast this in this way, this power has a casting time of 1 minute.

Alternatively, you can contact a droid or construct when you cast this power. Make a melee tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d6]] energy dégâts. When cast in this way, this power has a casting time of 1 action.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Homing Rockets.name: Homing Rockets
Homing Rockets.description:
You lock on to one or more targets within range and expel a series of three small explosives. Each explosive hits a creature de votre choix that you can see within range. An explosive deals [[/r 1d4 + 1]] fire dégâts to its target. The explosives all strike simultaneously, and you can direct them to hit une créature or several.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the power creates one more explosive for each slot niveau above 1st.

Greater Explosion.name: Greater Explosion
Greater Explosion.description:
You expell a massive explosion at a point within range. Each creature in a 40-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A target takes [[/r 40d6]] fire dégâts and is knocked à terre on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one but remain standing.

The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Stun Dart.name: Stun Dart
Stun Dart.description:
You emit a tiny crippling dart at a target within range. If la cible has 150 points de vie or fewer, it is étourdi. Otherwise, the power has no effect.

The étourdi target must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a successful sauvegarde, this stunning effect ends.

Remove Virus.name: Remove Virus
Remove Virus.description: At your contact, all tech-based curses affecting une créature or object end. If the object is a cursed enhanced item, its curse remains, but the power breaks its owner's attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Greater Analyze.name: Greater Analyze
Greater Analyze.description: Nommez ou décrivez une personne, un lieu ou un objet. Ce pouvoir vous donne un résumé des connaissances importantes à son sujet. Si la chose que vous avez nommée n'est pas connue en dehors d'un système planétaire, vous n'obtenez aucune information. Plus vous disposez déjà d'informations, plus les informations que vous recevez sont détaillées.

Defibrillate.name: Defibrillate
Defibrillate.description: You contact a creature that has died within the last minute and administer a shock to restore it to life. That creature returns to life with 1 point de vie. This power can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts. If la créature is lacking body parts or organs integral for its survival—its head, for instance—the power automatically fails. Once this power has restored a creature to life, it cannot benefit from this power again until it finishes a short or repos long.

Detect Enhancement.name: Detect Enhancement
Detect Enhancement.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of any enhancements within 30 mètres of you. If you sense an enhancement in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears an enhancement.

The power is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 mètres of wood or dirt.

Sending.name: Sending
Sending.description:
Vous envoyez un court message de vingt-cinq mots ou moins à une créature que vous connaissez et qui possède un lien de communication. La créature entend le message, vous reconnaît comme l'expéditeur si elle vous connaît et peut immédiatement répondre de la même manière.

Vous pouvez envoyer le message sur n'importe quelle distance et même vers d'autres planètes, mais si la cible se trouve sur une planète différente de la vôtre, il y a 5 % de chances que le message n'arrive pas.

Reboot.name: Reboot
Reboot.description: Choose a Medium or smaller droid or construct you can see. La cible must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is incapacitated jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Each time la créature takes dégâts or is la cible of a hostile power while incapacitated in this way, it can repeat this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Buffer.name: Buffer
Buffer.description:
Vous gagnez [[/r 1d4 + 4]] points de vie temporaires pour la durée.

Overcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement technologique de niveau 2 ou supérieur, vous gagnez 5 points de vie temporaires supplémentaires pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 1er.

Rime Strike.name: Rime Strike
Rime Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, as the cold energy seeps into its being. De plus, if la cible doesn't move at least 5 mètres before the start of your next turn, it immediately takes [[/r 1d8]] cold dégâts, and the power ends.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] cold dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for not moving increases to [[/r 2d8]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Ionic Bond.name: Ionic Bond
Ionic Bond.description:
A beam of ion energy lances out toward a creature within range, forming a sustained line between you and la cible. Make a ranged tech attack against cette créature. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] ion dégâts, and on each of your turns for the duration, you can use a action bonus to deal [[/r 1d8]] ion dégâts to la cible automatically. The power ends if you use your action bonus to do anything else. The power also ends if la cible is ever outside the power's range or if it has total cover from you.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the initial dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Firestorm.name: Firestorm
Firestorm.description:
Choose a point on the ground within range, incinerating everything in a rayon de 4,5 mètres.
