All creatures must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 8d8]] fire dégâts on a failure or half as much on a success. All large or smaller creatures are pushed to the edge of the power's radius. You may choose une créature to be at the very center of the firestorm, if you do so cette créature has disavantage on its jet de sauvegarde and is knocked à terre on a failure.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 7 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] and the radius increases by 5 mètres for each slot niveau above 6th.

Ion Blast.name: Ion Blast
Ion Blast.description:
You create a blast of ion energy. Choose une créature within range that you can see, or choose two creatures within range that are within 5 mètres of each other that you can see. A target must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] ion dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d4]]).

Spectrum Bolt.name: Spectrum Bolt
Spectrum Bolt.description:
You fire an undulating, warbling bolt of energy at a creature within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d8]] + [[/r 1d6]] dégâts. Choose one of the d8s. The number rolled on that die determines the attacks type de dégâts, as shown below.

| [[/r d8]] | Damage Type |

|:---:|:-----------:|

| 1 | Acid |

| 2 | Cold |

| 3 | Fire |

| 4 | Energy |

| 5 | Ion |

| 6 | Lightning |

| 7 | Poison |

| 8 | Sonic |

If you roll the same number on both d8s, the bolt leaps from la cible to a different creature de votre choix within 30 mètres of it. Make a new attack roll against the new target, and make a new jet de dégâts, which could cause the bolt to leap again. A creature can be targeted only once by each casting of this power.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, each target takes [[/r 1d6]] extra dégâts of the type rolled for each slot niveau above 1st.

Magnetic Field.name: Magnetic Field
Magnetic Field.description:
You create a strong magnetic field around you in a rayon de 3 mètres which moves with you, remaining centered on you. The field lasts for the power's duration.

The field has the following effects:

  • The area is difficult terrain for creatures other than you.
  • The attack rolls of attaque d'arme à distances which deal kinetic, energy, or ion dégâts have disavantage if the attacks pass in or out of the field.
  • Communications equipment cannot communicate into or out of the field.

Detect Invisibility.name: Detect Invisibility
Detect Invisibility.description: Pendant toute la durée, vous voyez les créatures et les objets invisibles comme s'ils étaient visibles.

Warding Shot.name: Warding Shot
Warding Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and a dim barrier surrounds it. The first time it would deal dégâts before the start of your next turn, that dégâts is reduced by [[/r 1d6]].

This power's dégâts reduction increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Minor Hologram.name: Minor Hologram
Minor Hologram.description:
Cette capacité is a minor tech trick that creates one of the following effects within range.

  • You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor.
  • You instantaneously light or snuff out a source of light.
  • You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.
  • You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.
  • You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hour.
  • You create a trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand and that lasts jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

If you use this power multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action.

Shutdown.name: Shutdown
Shutdown.description: You emit an electromagnetic pulse, shutting down all electronic devices, with the exception of your tech focus, that are not held by or under the direct control of a creature. If it is, la créature must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde to stop the device from being shut down. While the power is active, no electronic device in range can be started or restarted.

Jet of Flame.name: Jet of Flame
Jet of Flame.description:
A flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for the duration and harms neither you nor your equipment. The flame sheds bright light in a rayon de 3 mètres and dim light for an additional 10 mètres. The power ends if you dismiss it as an action or if you cast it again.

You can also attack with the flame, although doing so ends the power. When you cast this power, or as an action on a later turn, you can hurl the flame at a creature within 30 mètres of you. Make a ranged tech attack. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Pyrotechnics.name: Pyrotechnics
Pyrotechnics.description:
Choose an area of unenhanced flame that you can see and that fits within a 5-foot cube within range. You can extinguish the fire in that area, and you create either fireworks or smoke when you do so.

Fireworks. La cible explodes with a dazzling display of colors. Each creature within 10 mètres of la cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or become aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Smoke. Thick black smoke spreads out from la cible in a rayon de 6 mètres, moving around corners. The area of the smoke is heavily obscured. The smoke persists pendant 1 minute or until a strong wind disperses it.

Glide.name: Glide
Glide.description: One willing creature gains the ability to glide when falling. For the duration of the power, it falls at a rate of 30 mètres per round and can move up to 30 mètres horizontally as well on each of its turns. If la créature lands before the power ends, it takes no falling dégâts and can land on its mètres, and the power ends for cette créature.

Override Interface.name: Override Interface
Override Interface.description:
You choose one droid or construct you can see within range and attempt to remotely override its controls. La cible must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. If the construct has the 'Piloted' trait, and has a pilot controlling it that is not incapacitated, it gains a bonus to the jet de sauvegarde equal to the pilot's Intelligence modificateur. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is charmé by you for the duration.

While the droid is charmé, you have a wireless link with it as long as the two of you are on the same planet. Via your tech focus, you can use this link to issue commands to la créature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack cette créature," "Move over there," or "Fetch that object." If the droid completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itpersonnelle to the best of its ability.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour take total and precise control of la cible. Until the end of your next turn, the droid takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause la créature to use a réaction, but this requires you to use your own réaction as well.

Each time la cible takes dégâts, it makes a new Intelligence jet de sauvegarde against the power. If the jet de sauvegarde succeeds, the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a 6th-niveau tech slot, the duration is 10 minutes. When you use a 7th-niveau tech slot, the duration is 1 hour. When you use a tech slot of niveau 8 or higher, the duration is 8 hours.

Greater Hologram.name: Greater Hologram
Greater Hologram.description:
You create an image no larger than a 20 foot cube. It appears at a spot you can see and lasts for the duration. It seems completely real, sounds and other sensory effects included. You can't create a sensory effect strong enough to cause dégâts or a condition.

As long as you are within range of the illusion, you can use your action to make the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter it so that its movements appear natural for the image.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it as an illusion. A creature can use its action to determine that it's an illusion with a successful Investigation check. If a creature learns it's an illusion, it can see through the image, and the other sensory qualities become faint to it.

Overcharge Tech. The power lasts until dispelled without requiring concentration if cast at 6th-niveau or higher.

Sensor Probe.name: Sensor Probe
Sensor Probe.description:
You create a small, temporary, invisible probe that hovers in the air for the duration. You mentally receive visual information from the probe. It has darkvision out to 30 mètres. The eye can look in every direction.

As an action, you can move the probe up to 30 mètres in any direction. There's no limit on how far away from you it can be. A solid barrier blocks the probe's movement, but it can pass through an opening at least 1 inch in diameter.

Slow-Release Medpac.name: Slow-Release Medpac
Slow-Release Medpac.description: Kolto energy radiates from you in an aura with a rayon de 9 mètres. Until the power ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. You can use a action bonus to cause une créature in the aura (including you) to regain [[/r 2d6]] points de vie. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Fabricate Trap.name: Fabricate Trap
Fabricate Trap.description:
When you cast this power, you create a trap that will later trigger in response to a certain condition. You must attach it either to a surface (such as a table or a section of floor or wall) or within an object that can be closed or turned on (such as a book, door, or computer terminal) to conceal the trap. The trap can cover an area no larger than 10 mètres in diameter. At the GM's discretion, certain actions may cause the trap to break or be rendered inoperative.

The trap is well disguised, and generally and requires a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD to be found.

You decide what triggers the trap when you cast the power, such as entering a certain area or powering on the object. You can further refine the trigger so the trap activates only under certain circumstances or according to physical characteristics (such as height or weight) or creature kind (for example, the trap could be set to go off only droids or gungans). You can also set conditions for creatures that don't trigger the trap, such as those who say a certain password.

You may only have one instance of this trap active at a time. If you cast another trap before the previous one is triggered, the other trap becomes inert.

When you create the trap, choose an explosive trap or a power trap:

Explosive Trap. When triggered, the trap erupts in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on the trap. The explosion spreads around corners. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 5d8]] acid, cold, fire, lightning, or sonic dégâts on a failed jet de sauvegarde (your choice when you create the trap), or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Power Trap. You can store a prepared pouvoir technique of niveau 3 or lower in the trap by casting it as part of creating the trap. The trap must target a single creature or an area. The power being stored has no immediate effect when cast in this way. When the trap is triggered, the stored power is cast. If the trap has a target, it targets la créature that triggered the trap. If the power affects an area, the area is centered on cette créature. If the power requires concentration, it lasts until the end of its full duration.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts of an explosive trap increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 3rd. If you create a power trap, you can store any power of up to the same niveau as the slot you use for this power.

Energetic Burst.name: Energetic Burst
Energetic Burst.description:
A creature you contact gains 10 points de vie temporaires. While it has these points de vie, la créature can add [[/r 1d4]] to its jet de sauvegardes. Any remaining points de vie temporaires are lost when the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power with a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, la cible gains 5 additional points de vie temporaires for each slot niveau above 2nd. When you cast this power at niveau 4 or higher, the die size increases for every two slot niveaus above 2nd ([[/r d6]] at niveau 4, [[/r d8]] at niveau 6, [[/r d10]] at niveau 8).

Construct Droid.name: Construct Droid
Construct Droid.description:
You construct a droid, which is deployed in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. This droid uses the Constructed Droid stat block. When you cast the power, choose a design: Probe, Pyro, or Battle. The droid resembles a Class IV droid, and the design determines certain traits in its stat block. The droid falls to pieces and disintegrates when it drops to 0 points de vie or when the power ends.

The droid is an ally to you and your companions. In combat, the droid shares your initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your commands you issue through your tech focus (no action required). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.

The droid is a valid target for the tracker droid interface power. If that power is cast targeting the constructed droid, it only takes 1 minute to synchronize with the droid.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, use the higher niveau wherever the power's niveau appears in the stat block.

_

> ## Constructed Droid

>Medium droid, unaligned

> _

> - Classe d'Armure 11 + the niveau of the power (natural armor)

> - Hit Points 20 (Probe only) or 30 (Pyro and Battle only) + 10 for each slot niveau above 2nd

> - Speed 30 ft. (Pyro and Battle only); 0 ft. and fly 60 ft. (Probe only)

>_

>|STR|DEX|CON|INT|WIS|CHA|

>|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|

>|18 (+4)| 14 (+2)| 16 (+3)| 18 (+4)| 14 (+2)| 8 (-1)|

>_

> - Damage Vulnerabilities ion

> - Damage Resistances necrotic, poison, psychic

> - Condition Immunities disease, empoisonné

> - Senses darkvision 60 ft, passive Perception 12

> - Languages Galactic Basic, Binary, understands the languages you speak

> - Proficiency Bonus equals your bonus

> _

> Circuitry. The construct has disavantage on jet de sauvegardes against effects that would deal ion or lightning dégâts.

> Surveillance (Probe Only). The probe is proficient in Perception and one other skill or tool de votre choix.

> _

> ### Actions

> Multiattack. The droid makes a number of attacks equal to half this power's niveau (rounded down).

> Blaster. Ranged Weapon Attack: your tech attack modificateur to hit, range 60/240 ft., une cible. Hit: [[/r 1d6 + 3]] + the power's niveau energy dégâts.

> Vibroweapon. (Battle Only) Melee Weapon Attack: your tech attack modificateur to hit, reach 5 ft., une cible. Hit: [[/r 1d12 + 3]] + the power's niveau kinetic dégâts.

> Flamethrower. (Pyro Only) The droid shoots a stream of flame from itpersonnelle in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Creatures in the cone must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = your tech sauvegarde DD). On a failure, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts + [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts for each power niveau above 2nd. On a success, la créature takes half as much dégâts. This cannot be used with Multiattack.

Kolto Waves.name: Kolto Waves
Kolto Waves.description: A flood of kolto energy flows from you into injured creatures around you. You restore up to 700 points de vie, divided as you choose among any number of creatures that you can see within range. Creatures healed by this power are also cured of all diseases and any effect making them aveuglé or assourdi. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Superior Translation Program.name: Superior Translation Program
Superior Translation Program.description:
Vous accordez à jusqu'à quatre créatures consentantes la capacité de comprendre n'importe quelle langue enregistrée qu'elles lisent ou entendent. De plus, ils acquièrent la capacité de parler cette langue s’ils sont physiquement capables de la parler normalement.

Overcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement technologique de niveau 7 ou supérieur, vous pouvez affecter une créature supplémentaire pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 6.

Wire Line.name: Wire Line
Wire Line.description:
You launch a grappling wire toward a creature you can see within range. Make a melee tech attack against la cible. If the attack hits, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts, and if la créature is Large or smaller, you pull la créature up to 10 mètres closer to you.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Cryogenic Volley.name: Cryogenic Volley
Cryogenic Volley.description:
An explosion of cold energy erupts from a point you choose within range. Each creature in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d6]] cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half as much dégâts and isn't slowed.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Combustive Shot.name: Combustive Shot
Combustive Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes ignited (your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique).

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque à distance deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] fire dégâts to la cible, and the ignited dégâts increases to [[/r 1d4]] + your tech casting modificateur de caractéristique. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d6]] and [[/r 1d4]], respectively, at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Element of Surprise.name: Element of Surprise
Element of Surprise.description:
You expel a sabotage charge at la créature that attacked you. The creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 2d10]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Cryogenic Wave.name: Cryogenic Wave
Cryogenic Wave.description:
A wave of cold energy spreads out from you. Each creature in a cône de 4,5 mètres must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a success, it takes half as much dégâts, and suffers no additional effect.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st. At niveau 3 or above, a creature gains 2 slowed niveaus on a failed sauvegarde. At niveau 5 or above, a creature gains 3 slowed niveaus on a failed sauvegarde. At niveau 7 or above, a creature gains 4 slowed niveaus on a failed sauvegarde.

Ballistic Shield.name: Ballistic Shield
Ballistic Shield.description: A flickering blue shield surrounds your body. Until the power ends, you have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts.

Scrambling Field.name: Scrambling Field
Scrambling Field.description:
A 10-foot-radius shimmering sphere of power suppression surrounds you. Within the sphere, powers can't be cast and enhanced items become mundane. Until the power ends, the sphere moves with you, centered on you.

Powers and other enhanced effects are suppressed in the sphere and can't protrude into it. A slot expended to cast a suppressed power is consumed. While an effect is suppressed, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration.

Targeted Effects. Powers and other enhanced effects cette cible a creature or an object in the sphere have no effect on cette cible.

Enhanced Areas. The area of another power or enhanced effect, such as explosion, can't extend into the sphere. If the sphere overlaps an enhanced area, the part of the area that is covered by the sphere is suppressed.

Powers. Any active power or other enhanced effect on a creature or an object in the sphere is suppressed while la créature or object is in it.

Enhanced Items. The properties and powers of enhanced items are suppressed in the sphere. For example, a +1 lightsaber in the sphere functions as an unenhanced lightsaber.

An enhanced weapon's properties and powers are suppressed if it is used against a target in the sphere or wielded by an attacker in the sphere. If an enhanced weapon or a piece of enhanced ammunition fully leaves the sphere (for example, if you fire an enhanced shot or throw an enhanced vibrospear at a target outside the sphere), the enhancement of the item ceases to be suppressed as soon as it exits.

Enhanced Travel. Teleportation fails to work in the sphere, whether the sphere is the destination or the departure point for such enhanced travel. A portal to another location temporarily closes while in the sphere.

Creatures and Objects. A creature or object summoned or created by powers temporarily winks out of existence in the sphere. Such a creature instantly reappears once the space la créature occupied is no longer within the sphere.

Tech Override/Diminish Tech. Powers and enhanced effects such as tech override have no effect on the sphere. Likewise, the spheres created by different scrambling field powers don't nullify each other.

Countermeasures.name: Countermeasures
Countermeasures.description:
Pour toute la durée, vous bénéficiez des avantages suivants :

  • Vous êtes immunisé contre la technique de pouvoir des fusées à tête chercheuse .
  • Vous et les objets que vous portez ou transportez ne peuvent pas être détectés par les techniques de pouvoir qui révèlent votre emplacement, telles que scan zone ou scan de fréquence, à moins que le lanceur de sorts ne réussisse un jet de sauvegarde d'intelligence.
  • Les créatures ont un désavantage lors des tests de Sagesse (Survie) pour vous suivre.

Disperse Energy.name: Disperse Energy
Disperse Energy.description:
You have resistance to acid, cold, fire, lightning, and sonic dégâts for the power's duration.

When you take dégâts of one of those types, you can use your réaction to gain immunity to that type of dégâts, including against the triggering dégâts. If you do so, the resistances end, and you have the immunity jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour, at which time the power ends.

Skill Protocol.name: Skill Protocol
Skill Protocol.description:
You enhance a droid or construct's protocols. You contact one willing droid or construct and give it expertise in one tool or skill de votre choix.

You must choose a tool or skill in which la cible is proficient and that isn't already benefiting from an effect, such as expertise, that doubles its bonus de maîtrise.

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.description:
Choose a manufactured metal object, such as a blaster or a suit of heavy or medium metal armor, that you can see within range. You cause the object to glow red-hot. Any creature in physical contact with the object takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts when you cast the power. Until the power ends, you can use a action bonus on each of your subsequent turns to cause this dégâts again.

If an object is held, worn, or integrated, and a creature takes the dégâts from it, la créature must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or drop the object if it can. If it doesn't—or can't—drop the object, it has disavantage on attack rolls and test de caractéristiques jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Kolto Infusion.name: Kolto Infusion
Kolto Infusion.description:
Choose a creature that you can see within range. A surge of kolto energy washes over la créature, causing it to regain 70 points de vie. This power also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting la cible. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 7 or higher, the amount of healing increases by 10 for each slot niveau above 6th.

Energizing Aura.name: Energizing Aura
Energizing Aura.description: Energizing light radiates out from you in a rayon de 9 mètres. Creatures de votre choix in that radius when you cast this power have avantage on all jet de sauvegardes, and other creatures have disavantage on attack rolls against them until the power ends.

Shared Shielding.name: Shared Shielding
Shared Shielding.description:
This power wards a willing ally you contact and creates an energy link between you and la cible until the power ends. While la cible is within 60 mètres of you, it gains a +1 bonus to AC and jet de sauvegardes, and it has resistance to all dégâts. Also, each time it takes dégâts, you take the same amount of dégâts.

The power ends if you drop to 0 points de vie or if you and la cible become separated by more than 60 mètres. It also ends if the power is cast again on either of the connected creatures. You can also dismiss the power as an action.

Scrambling Barrier.name: Scrambling Barrier
Scrambling Barrier.description:
An immobile, faintly shimmering barrier springs into existence in a rayon de 3 mètres around you and remains for the duration.

Any pouvoir technique of niveau 5 or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures or objects within it, even if the power is cast using a higher niveau tech slot. Such a power can target creatures and objects within the barrier, but the power has no effect on them. Similarly, the area within the barrier is excluded from the areas affected by such powers.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 7 or higher, the barrier blocks powers of one niveau higher for each slot niveau above 6th.

Sonic Fists.name: Sonic Fists
Sonic Fists.description: You enhance your fists—or analogous appendages—with sonic energy. For the duration, you have a natural weapon which deals [[/r 1d10]] sonic dégâts on a hit. Every time you hit a creature that is no more than one size larger than you with a attaque au corps à corps with this weapon, you can push it 5 mètres away from you.

Tactical Advantage.name: Tactical Advantage
Tactical Advantage.description:
Choisissez une créature consentante que vous pouvez voir à portée. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, la vitesse de la cible est doublée, elle gagne un bonus de +2 à la CA, elle a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité, et elle gagne une action supplémentaire à chacun de ses tours. Cette action ne peut être utilisée que pour effectuer l'action Attaque (une seule attaque d'arme), Se précipiter, Se désengager, Se cacher ou Utiliser un objet.

Lorsque le pouvoir prend fin, la cible ne peut plus bouger ou entreprendre des actions avant son prochain tour, alors qu'une vague de léthargie la balaye.

Reprogram Droid.name: Reprogram Droid
Reprogram Droid.description:
You alter the protocols of a droid that you can see within range, forcing it to carry out some service or refrain from some action or course of activity as you decide. The droid must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become charmé by you for the duration. While the droid is charmé by you, it takes [[/r 5d10]] lightning dégâts each time it acts in a manner directly counter to your instructions, but it can only do so once each day.

You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the power ends. You can end the power early by using an action to dismiss it. The remove virus power also ends it.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of 7th or niveau 8, the duration is 1 year. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 9, the power lasts until it is ended by remove virus.

Greater Translocate.name: Greater Translocate
Greater Translocate.description: Your form shimmers in a holographic configuration, and then collapses. You teleport up to 60 mètres to an unoccupied space that you can see. On each of your turns before the power ends, you can use a action bonus to teleport in this way again.

Acidic Strike.name: Acidic Strike
Acidic Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes sheathed in a thick acidic slime jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Until the start of your next turn, if la cible becomes agrippé, or succeeds in grappling or maintaining a grapple, the slime is pressed into its body, causing it to immediately take [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for taking grappling or maintaining a grapple increases to [[/r 2d8]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Cloaking Screen.name: Cloaking Screen
Cloaking Screen.description: Vous ou une créature que vous contactez devenez invisible jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir. Tout ce que porte ou transporte la cible est invisible tant qu'il se trouve sur la personne de la cible.

Expeditious Retreat.name: Expeditious Retreat
Expeditious Retreat.description: Cette puissance vous procure une poussée d'adrénaline qui vous permet de vous déplacer à un rythme incroyable. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir, puis en guise de bonus d'action à chacun de vos tours jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, vous pouvez effectuer l'action Dash.

Wire Tow.name: Wire Tow
Wire Tow.description:
You project a length of wire towards a foe to bring them within your grasp. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts, and you can pull it up to 25 mètres closer to you. If you score a critical hit, la cible is also knocked à terre. If la cible ends this movement within 5 mètres of you and is no more than one size larger than you, la cible is agrippé by you for the duration.

If a creature you grapple with this power uses its action to escape, it must succeed on a Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check against your tech sauvegarde DD to do so.

This power ends if the attack misses or the grapple ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Tracker Droid Interface.name: Tracker Droid Interface
Tracker Droid Interface.description:
You interface a tracker droid with your tech focus, creating a permanent link.

Your tracker droid acts independently of you, but it always obeys your commands. In combat, it acts on your turn.

While your tracker droid is within 100 mètres of you, you can communicate with it via your tech focus. De plus, as an action, you can see through your droid's vision and hear what it hears jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, gaining the benefits of any special senses that the droid has. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses.

You can't maintain an interface between more than one tracker droid and your tech focus at a time.

Finally, when you cast a pouvoir technique with a range of contact, your tracker can deliver the power as if it had cast it. Your tracker droid must be within 100 mètres of you, and it must use its réaction to deliver the power when you cast it. If the power requires an attack roll, you use your attack modificateur for the roll.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can maintain a link with one more tracker droid for every two slot niveaus above 1st. Multiple tracker droids act on the same initiative. You can only see through one droid's vision at a time, but you can toggle between droids as a action bonus. Each droid must still be within 100 mètres of you.

Voltaic Shielding.name: Voltaic Shielding
Voltaic Shielding.description:
A protective barrier surrounds you, manifesting as crackling lightning that covers you and your gear. You gain 5 points de vie temporaires for the duration. If a creature hits you with a attaque au corps à corps while you have these points de vie, la créature takes 5 lightning dégâts.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, both the points de vie temporaires and the lightning dégâts increase by 5 for each slot.

Extinguish.name: Extinguish
Extinguish.description:
You spray carbon foam in a 5-foot cube originating from a point within range. Flames within the affected area are instantly quenched, and objects within the affected area cannot be ignited for at least one minute. Any creature in the affected area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts.

When you reach niveau 5, this power can instead target a 10-foot cube within range. You gain additional options of increasing size when you reach niveau 11 (15-foot cube), and niveau 17 (20-foot cube).

Illusory Strike.name: Illusory Strike
Illusory Strike.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you create an illusory duplicate of yourpersonnelle in your space that only la cible can see. La cible has disavantage on the next attack roll it makes against you before the start of your next turn.

This power creates multiple duplicates when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, you create a second illusory duplicate, and la cible has disavantage on the next two attacks it makes against you before the start of your next turn. The number of duplicates and attacks with disavantage increases to three at niveau 11 and four at niveau 17.

Mobile Lights.name: Mobile Lights
Mobile Lights.description:
You create up to four orbs of light within range that hover in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form of Medium size. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds dim light in a rayon de 3 mètres.

As a action bonus on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 mètres to a new spot within range. A light must be within 20 mètres of another light created by this power, and a light winks out if it exceeds the power's range.

Jump Jet.name: Jump Jet
Jump Jet.description:
You boost yourpersonnelle through the air with a brief surge of repulsor energy. You can rise a number of mètres equal to 20 x your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. You can also move a number of mètres horizontally during any part of the movement equal to 5 x your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique. At the end of the turn on which you cast this power, you float gently to the ground if you are still aloft.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can rise an additional 20 mètres, and move horizontally by another 5 mètres for each slot niveau above 1st.

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
You contact one object that is no larger than 10 mètres in any dimension. Until the power ends, the object sheds bright light in a rayon de 6 mètres and dim light for an additional 20 mètres. The light can be colored as you like. Completely covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The power ends if you cast it again or dismiss it as an action.

If you target an object held or worn by a hostile creature, cette créature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to avoid the power.

Detect Traps.name: Detect Traps
Detect Traps.description:
You sense the presence, general location, and nature of any trap within 120 mètres of you that is within line of sight. A trap, for this power, includes anything that would inflict a sudden or unexpected effect you consider harmful or undesirable, which was specifically intended by its creator.

While the power is active, you have avantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Intelligence (Investigation) checks to find any traps that are within line of sight.

Analyze.name: Analyze
Analyze.description:
Vous choisissez un objet que vous devez contacter tout au long du lancement du pouvoir. S'il s'agit d'un objet amélioré ou modifié, vous apprenez ses propriétés et comment les utiliser, s'il nécessite une harmonisation pour être utilisé et combien de charges il possède, le cas échéant. Vous apprenez si des pouvoirs affectent l'objet et de quoi il s'agit. Si l'objet a été créé par un pouvoir, vous apprenez quel pouvoir l'a créé.

Si vous contactez une créature tout au long du lancement, vous apprenez quelles techniques de pouvoir, le cas échéant, l'affectent actuellement.

Elemental Accelerant.name: Elemental Accelerant
Elemental Accelerant.description:
Choose une créature you can see and one type de dégâts: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or sonic. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, the first time on each turn when it takes dégâts of the chosen type, it takes an extra [[/r 2d6]] dégâts of it. La cible also loses resistance to the type until the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. You can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 4th. The creatures must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Antipathy/Sympathy.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
Antipathy/Sympathy.description:
This power attracts or repels creatures de votre choix. You target something within range, either a Huge or smaller object or creature or an area that is no larger than a 200-foot cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent creature, such as rancors, kath hounds, or twi'leks. You invest la cible with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified creatures for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect.

Antipathy. The power causes creatures of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid la cible. When such a creature can see la cible or comes within 60 mètres of it, la créature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become effrayé. The creature remains effrayé while it can see la cible or is within 60 mètres of it. While effrayé by la cible, la créature must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see la cible. If la créature moves more than 60 mètres from la cible and can't see it, la créature is no longer effrayé, but la créature becomes effrayé again if it regains sight of la cible or moves within 60 mètres of it.

Sympathy. The power causes the specified creatures to feel an intense urge to approach la cible while within 60 mètres of it or able to see it. When such a creature can see la cible or comes within 60 mètres of it, la créature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within reach of la cible. When la créature has done so, it can't willingly move away from la cible.

If la cible dégâtss or otherwise harms an affected creature, the affected creature can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to end the effect, as described below.

Ending the Effect. If an affected creature ends its turn while not within 60 mètres of la cible or able to see it, la créature makes a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature is no longer affected by la cible and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as unnatural. De plus, a creature affected by the power is allowed another Wisdom jet de sauvegarde every 24 hours while the power persists.

A creature that successfully sauvegardes against this effect is immune to it pendant 1 minute, after which time it can be affected again.

Mending.name: Mending
Mending.description: Cette capacité repairs a single break or tear in an object you contact, such as broken chain link, two halves of a broken key, a torn strap, or a leaking cup. As long as the break or tear is no larger than 1 foot in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former dégâts. If you target a droid or construction with this feature, it can spend and roll one of its Hit Dice and regain that many points de vie.

Preparedness.name: Preparedness
Preparedness.description: Vous contactez une créature volontaire. Pendant la durée, la cible peut ajouter [[/r 1d8]] à ses tests d'Initiative.

Ward.name: Ward
Ward.description: You emit a powerful force field that deflects incoming attacks. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts dealt by attaque d'armes.

Contingency.name: Contingency
Contingency.description:
Choisissez une technique de pouvoir de niveau 5 ou inférieur que vous pouvez lancer, qui a un temps d'incantation de 1 action et qui peut vous cibler. Vous lancez ce pouvoir, appelé pouvoir contingent, dans le cadre du lancement de la contingence, dépensant des points technologiques pour les deux, mais le pouvoir contingent n'entre pas en vigueur. Au lieu de cela, il prend effet lorsqu’une certaine circonstance se produit. Vous décrivez cette circonstance lorsque vous lancez les deux pouvoirs.

Le pouvoir contingent prend effet immédiatement après que la circonstance se présente pour la première fois, que vous le vouliez ou non, et la contingence prend alors fin.

Le pouvoir contingent ne prend effet que sur vous, même s'il peut normalement cibler les autres. Vous ne pouvez utiliser qu’un seul pouvoir de contingence à la fois. Si vous lancez à nouveau ce pouvoir, l’effet d’un autre pouvoir de contingence sur vous prend fin. De plus, la contingence s'arrête sur vous si jamais votre attention technique n'est pas portée sur votre personne.

Itemize.name: Itemize
Itemize.description: You instantly learn the exact quantity of one type of item within 30 mètres of you. It must be a type of item that you've handled in the past; you can't, for example, use itemize to find out how many BKGs are nearby if you've never handled such a weapon. The object being itemized must also be reasonably specific. You can learn how many meilooruns are nearby, for example, but not how much fruit.

Implant Message.name: Implant Message
Implant Message.description:
You implant a message within an object in range, a message that is uttered when a trigger condition is met. Choose an object that you can see and that isn't being worn or carried by another creature. Then speak the message, which must be 25 words or less, though it can be delivered over as long as 10 minutes. Finally, determine the circumstance that will trigger the power to deliver your message.

When that circumstance occurs, the message is recited in your voice and at the same volume you spoke. When you cast this power, you can have the power end after it delivers its message, or it can remain and repeat its message whenever the trigger occurs.

The triggering circumstance can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur within 30 mètres of the object. For example, you could instruct the message to play when any creature moves within 30 mètres of the object or when a bell rings within 30 mètres of it.

Invulnerability.name: Invulnerability
Invulnerability.description: A flickering blue aura shimmers into being around you. Until the power ends, you are immune to all dégâts.

Kolto Dispenser.name: Kolto Dispenser
Kolto Dispenser.description:
You establish a mobile first aid station that radiates kolto in a 5-foot cube you can see within range.

Until the power ends, whenever you or a creature you can see moves into the station's space for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, you can cause the station to restore [[/r 1d6]] points de vie to cette créature (no action required). The station can heal un nombre de fois égal à 1 + your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of twice). After healing that number of times, the station disintegrates. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

As a action bonus on your turn, you can move the station up to 30 mètres to a space you can see.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Enhance Weapon.name: Améliorer l'arme
Enhance Weapon.description:
An unenhanced weapon you contact becomes an enhanced weapon. Choose one of these type de dégâtss: acid, cold, energy, fire, ion, kinetic, or lightning. For the duration, an unenhanced weapon you contact has a +1 to attack rolls and deals an extra [[/r 1d4]] dégâts of the chosen type.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a 5th or niveau 6 tech slot, the bonus to attack rolls increases to +2 and the extra dégâts increases to [[/r 2d4]]. When you use a slot of niveau 7 or higher, the bonus increases to +3 and the extra dégâts increases to [[/r 3d4]].

Disassemble.name: Disassemble
Disassemble.description: One constructed object up to 100 lbs. in weight that you contact falls to pieces, separating into its component parts. For instance, a vibrosword separates into a blade, handle, oscillator, and guard, while a hovercart collapses into a repulsor engine, bolts, and metal panels. If the object is being worn, carried, or operated by a creature, la créature can make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. On a successful sauvegarde, the item is unaffected.

Fabricate.name: Fabricate
Fabricate.description:
You convert raw materials into products of the same material.

For example, you can fabricate a wooden bridge from a clump of trees, a rope from a patch of hemp, and clothes from bantha hide.

Choose raw materials that you can see within range. You can fabricate a Large or smaller object (contained within a 10-foot cube, or eight connected 5-foot cubes), given a sufficient quantity of raw material. If you are working with metal, stone, or another mineral substance, however, the fabricated object can be no larger than Medium (contained within a single 5-foot cube). The quality of objects made by the power is commensurate with the quality of the raw materials.

Creatures or enhanced items can't be created by this power. You also can't use it to create items that ordinarily require a high degree of craftsmanship, such as jewelry, weapons, glass, or armor, unless you have maîtrise with the type of tool used to craft such objects.

Capacity Boost.name: Capacity Boost
Capacity Boost.description:
Vous renforcez une arme blaster que vous tenez. Pendant toute la durée, vous pouvez recharger l'arme une fois par chacun de vos tours sans utiliser d'action, et comme bonus d'action à chacun de vos tours vous pouvez effectuer une attaque avec l'arme.

Overcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement technologique de niveau 5 ou supérieur, vous pouvez effectuer deux attaques avec votre bonus d'action, au lieu d'un.

Decryption Program.name: Decryption Program
Decryption Program.description: You gain insight into an encrypted message you are holding when you cast this power, granting you avantage on test de caractéristiques you make to decipher the document.

Debilitating Gas.name: Debilitating Gas
Debilitating Gas.description:
You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of gas centered on a point. The cloud spreads around corners and its area is heavily obscured. It lingers in the air for the duration.

Each creature completely in the cloud at the start of its turn must make a Constitution sauvegarde against poison. On a failure, la créature does nothing that turn. Creatures that don't need to breathe or are immune to poison automatically succeed.

A wind of 10mph disperses the cloud after 4 rounds. A wind of 20mph disperses it after 1 round.

Absorb Energy.name: Absorb Energy
Absorb Energy.description:
The power captures some of the incoming energy, lessening its effect on you and storing it for your next attaque au corps à corps. You have resistance to the triggering type de dégâts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Also, the first time you hit with a attaque au corps à corps on your next turn, la cible takes an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts of the triggering type, and the power ends.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a power slot of niveau 2 or higher, the extra dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Release.name: Release
Release.description:
Choisissez un objet que vous pouvez voir à portée. L'objet peut être une porte, une boîte, un coffre, un ensemble de classeurs, une serrure ou tout autre objet contenant un moyen banal ou amélioré qui empêche l'accès.

Une cible qui est maintenue fermée par une serrure banale ou qui est bloquée ou barrée devient déverrouillée, décollée ou débarrassée. Si l'objet possède plusieurs verrous, un seul d'entre eux est déverrouillé.

Si vous choisissez une cible maintenue fermée avec lock, cette alimentation est supprimée pendant 10 minutes, pendant lesquelles la cible peut être ouverte et fermée normalement.

Electromesh.name: Electromesh
Electromesh.description:
You expel a mass of thick, adhesive mesh at a point de votre choix within range. The mesh fill a 20-foot cube from that point for the duration. The mesh is difficult terrain and lightly obscures their area.

If the mesh isn't anchored between two solid masses (such as walls) or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling, the electromesh collapses on itpersonnelle, and the power ends at the start of your next turn. Mesh layered over a flat surface has a depth of 5 mètres.

Each creature that starts its turn in the mesh or that enters it during its turn must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is entravé as long as it remains in the mesh or until it breaks free.

A creature entravé by the mesh can use its action to make a test de Force against your tech sauvegarde DD. If it succeeds, it is no longer entravé.

The mesh is flammable. Any 5-foot cube of electromesh exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing [[/r 2d4]] fire dégâts to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.

Detonator.name: Detonator
Detonator.description:
You launch a detonator at a creature. Make a ranged tech attack against a creature you can see within range. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d6]] fire dégâts, and chaque créature within 5 mètres of la cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] fire dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by one die when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]/[[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]/[[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]/[[/r 4d4]]).

Rime Shot.name: Rime Shot
Rime Shot.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and la créature gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its turn as the air around it turns frigid.

This power deals additional dégâts when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5 the attaque à distance deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] cold dégâts. This dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] again at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Tri-Shot.name: Tri-Shot
Tri-Shot.description:
Choose up to three creatures within range, none of whom can be more than 10 mètres apart. If you choose three creatures, each target must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] energy dégâts. If you choose two creatures, each target takes [[/r 1d6]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde instead. If you choose only une créature, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

This power's dégâts increases by one die when you reach niveau 5 (two dice), niveau 11 (three dice), and niveau 17 (four dice).

Smuggle.name: Smuggle
Smuggle.description: You dampen sound and light and dull the scent from creatures in your vicinity. For the duration, chaque créature you choose within 30 mètres of you has a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and can't be tracked except by enhanced means while within this radius. Vous pouvez choisir yourpersonnelle as well. A creature that receives this bonus leaves behind no traces of its passage.

Read Memory.name: Read Memory
Read Memory.description:
Vous lisez la mémoire d'un droïde ou d'une construction neutralisée à portée. La cible doit avoir son noyau de mémoire (et/ou d'autres composants appropriés) intact.

Jusqu'à la fin du courant, vous pouvez poser jusqu'à cinq questions. En fonction de ce qu'elle sait ou de ce qu'elle a vu, la cible fournit en réponse des données visuelles, sonores ou textuelles. La cible ne peut pas fournir de nouvelles informations et ne peut pas spéculer sur des événements futurs.

Kolto Reserve.name: Kolto Reserve
Kolto Reserve.description: You contact a creature and grant it a small reserve of kolto. The first time la cible would drop to 0 points de vie as a result of taking dégâts, la cible instead drops to 1 point de vie, and the power ends. If the power is still in effect when la cible is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing dégâts, that effect is instead negated against la cible, and the powers ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Tranquilizer.name: Tranquilizer
Tranquilizer.description:
You emit a tranquilizing dart that knocks a creature inconscient. Roll [[/r 5d8]]; if la créature's remaining points de vie are less than the total, la créature falls inconscient until the power ends, the sleeper takes dégâts, or someone uses an action to shake or slap the sleeper awake. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can target an additional creature for each slot niveau above 1st. For each target, roll [[/r 5d8]] separately.

Invisibility to Cameras.name: Invisibility to Cameras
Invisibility to Cameras.description: Jusqu'à quatre créatures de votre choix deviennent indétectables par les capteurs électroniques et les caméras. Tout ce que la cible porte ou transporte est également indétectable, tant qu'il se trouve sur la personne de la cible. La cible est toujours visible en vision régulière.

Group Hologram.name: Group Hologram
Group Hologram.description:
This power allows you to change the appearance of any number of creatures that you can see within range. You give each target you choose a new, illusory appearance. An unwilling target can make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by this power.

The power disguises physical appearance as well as clothing, armor, weapons, and equipment. Vous pouvez faire chaque créature seem 1 foot shorter or taller and appear thin, fat, or in between. You can't change a target's body type, so you must choose a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you. The power lasts for the duration, unless you use your action to dismiss it sooner.

The changes wrought by this power fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this power to add a hat to a creature's outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who contactes it would feel nothing or would feel la créature's head and hair. If you use this power to appear thinner than you are, the hand of someone who reaches out to contact you would bump into you while it was seemingly still in midair.

A creature can use its action to inspect a target and make an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. If it succeeds, it becomes aware that la cible is disguised.

Encrypted Message.name: Encrypted Message
Encrypted Message.description:
You point your finger toward a creature within range that possesses a commlink and whisper a message. La cible (and only la cible) hears the message and can send an encrypted reply that only you can hear. These messages cannot be intercepted or decrypted by unenhanced means.

You can cast this power through solid objects if you are familiar with la cible and know it is beyond the barrier. 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 mètres of wood blocks the power. The power doesn't have to follow a straight line and can travel freely around corners or through openings.

Storming Shot.name: Storming Shot
Storming Shot.description:
As a part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme à distance against une créature within your weapon's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects and becomes shocked jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. When this power hits a target, if there is a creature within 30 mètres who is shocked, an arc of lightning courses between the two creatures, dealing [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts to both of them. If there are multiple other creatures who are shocked, the lightning leaps to the closest creature.

The power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the effects of both the attaque d'arme à distance and discharge deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts. Both jet de dégâtss increase by an additional [[/r 1d6]] at niveaux 11 et 17.

Lock.name: Lock
Lock.description:
You contact a closed door, window, gate, chest, or other entryway, and it becomes locked for the duration. You and la créatures you designate when you cast this power can open the object normally. You can also set a password that, when spoken within 5 mètres of the object, suppresses this power pendant 1 minute. Otherwise, it is impassable until it is broken or the power is dispelled or suppressed. Casting release on the object suppresses lock for 10 minutes.

While affected by this power, the object is more difficult to break or force open; the DD to break it or pick any locks on it increases by 10.

Stinger.name: Stinger
Stinger.description:
You fire a stinging dart at a creature within range. Make a ranged tech attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] poison dégâts, and if la cible is a humanoid or beast, it can't regain points de vie jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Shocking Ray.name: Shocking Ray
Shocking Ray.description:
You create three ionic rays and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at une cible or several. Make a ranged tech attack for each ray. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d4]] ion dégâts.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, you create one additional ray for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Translation Program.name: Translation Program
Translation Program.description:
Pour la durée, vous comprenez le sens littéral de toute langue enregistrée parlée que vous entendez, tant que vous vous concentrez sur la technologie. Vous comprenez également toute langue écrite que vous voyez, mais vous devez être à portée de la surface sur laquelle les mots sont écrits. Il faut environ 1 minute pour lire une page de texte.

Ce pouvoir ne décode pas les messages secrets contenus dans un texte, ni n'interprète un glyphe, tel qu'une ancienne rune Sith, qui ne fait pas partie d'un langage écrit.

Production Values.name: Production Values
Production Values.description:
You cause a minor effect within range. Choose one of the following:

  • Your natural voice booms up to three times louder than normal pendant 1 minute. You can also alter the sound of your voice to achieve a certain effect--to sound more intimidating, for example.
  • You cause unenhanced electronic lights to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color pendant 1 minute.
  • You cause harmless tremors in the ground pendant 1 minute.
  • You create a sound within range for up to 1 minute. The sound can range in volume from a whisper to a scream.
  • You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut.
  • You alter the appearance of your eyes pendant 1 minute.
  • You create an illusory image of an object no larger than a 5 foot cube. The illusion is purely visual.

If you cast this power multiple times, you can have up to three of its 1-minute effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action.

A creature that witnesses the effects of this power can use its action to make an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful check, la créature discerns that the effects are illusory, and they become faint to la créature.

The maximum number of active effects increases by 3 when you reach niveau 5 (6), niveau 11 (9), and niveau 17 (12).

Fabricate Minor Trap.name: Fabricate Minor Trap
Fabricate Minor Trap.description:
You ward a rayon de 9 mètres sphere centered on you with a manually-operated trap. The trap is well disguised. Any creature that can't see the area at the time the power is cast must make a Wisdom (Perception) check against your tech sauvegarde DD to notice the trap before entering the area. Once after this power is cast, when a creature you can see enters or moves within the warded area, you can use your réaction to trigger the trap. The effect on la créature depends on the kind of trap you employ, which you choose when you cast this power. You can maintain a maximum number of instances of this power at once equal to your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique.

Blaster. This power creates a blaster turret which fires at la cible when triggered. The creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

Pitfall. This power creates a 5-foot diameter, 15-foot deep pitfall in the ground beneath la créature when triggered, which must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed jet de sauvegarde, la créature falls into the pitfall. On a success, la créature falls à terre in a space within 5 mètres of the pitfall. This pitfall cannot be created through manufactured terrain. Otherwise, the hole is well constructed and lasts even after the power's duration. Flying creatures avoid this trap.

Snare. This power creates a snare of rope, wire, vine, or webs that entangle la créature. The creature must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. A Large or larger creature has avantage on this jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts and is entravé until the start of its next turn. On a success, la créature takes half as much dégâts and ends its movement.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the effects increase, based on the trap.

Blaster. The dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st. If cast using a slot of niveau 3 or higher, this power targets creatures in a sphere centered on the triggering creature within the warded area, the radius of which is 5 mètres for every two slot niveaus above 1st.

Pitfall. The depth of the pitfall increases by 5 mètres for each slot niveau above 1st. If cast using a slot of niveau 3 or higher, the diameter of the pit is 5 mètres wider for every two slot niveaus above 1st.

Snare. The dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st. If cast using a slot of niveau 3 or higher, Large creatures no longer have avantage on their jet de sauvegarde. This size category increases for every two slot niveaus above 1st.

Burst of Flame.name: Burst of Flame
Burst of Flame.description:
You expel a burst of flame in a line 30 mètres long and 5 mètres wide, originating from you. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Autonomous Servant.name: Autonomous Servant
Autonomous Servant.description:
You contact one Tiny, unenhanced object that isn't attached to another object or a surface and isn't being carried by another creature. La cible animates and gains little arms and legs, becoming a creature under your control until the power ends or la créature drops to 0 points de vie. See the stat block for its statistics.

_

> ## Servant

>Tiny construct, unaligned

> _

> - Classe d'Armure 15 (natural armor)

> - Hit Points 10 ([[/r 4d4]])

> - Speed 30 mètres, climb 30 mètres

>_

>|STR|DEX|CON|INT|WIS|CHA|

>|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|

>|4 (-3)|16 (+3)|10 (+0)|2 (-4)|10 (+0)|1 (-5)|

>_

> - Damage Vulnerabilities ion

> - Damage Resistances necrotic, poison, psychic

> - Condition Immunities charmé, assourdi, épuisement, empoisonné

> - Senses blindsight 60 mètres (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 10

> - Languages —

> _

> Circuitry. The construct has disavantage on jet de sauvegardes against effects that would deal ion or lightning dégâts.

> ### Actions

> Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 mètres, une cible. Hit 5 ([[/r 1d4 + 3]]) kinetic dégâts.

As a action bonus, you can nonverbally command la créature if it is within 120 mètres of you. (If you control multiple creatures with this power, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one.) You decide what action la créature will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a simple, general command, such as to fetch a code cylinder, stand watch, or stack some small objects. If you issue no commands, the servant does nothing other than defend itpersonnelle against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the servant continues to follow that order until its task is complete.

When la créature drops to 0 points de vie, it reverts to its original form, and any remaining dégâts carries over to that form.

The creature is considered a valid target for the tracker droid interface power.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Salvo.name: Salvo
Salvo.description:
You launch three projectiles at points you can see within range. Each creature within a rayon de 3 mètres sphere of each point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d6]] fire and [[/r 3d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature in the area of more than one sphere is affected only once.

The power dégâtss objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, you create four projectiles. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 8 or higher, you create five projectiles.

Hologram.name: Hologram
Hologram.description:
You create an image that is no larger than a 15-foot cube. The image appears at a spot within range and lasts for the duration. The image is purely visual. If anything passes through it, it is revealed to be an illusion.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour cause the image to move to any spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image.

A creature that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, la créature can see through the image.

Sabotage Charges.name: Sabotage Charges
Sabotage Charges.description:
You create six tiny sabotage charges that last for the power's duration. When you cast the power, and as a action bonus on subsequent turns, you can hurl up to two of the charges to points you choose within 120 mètres. Each charge explodes if it reaches the point or hits a solid surface. Each creature within 5 mètres of the explosion must make a Dexterity sauvegarde. The explosion deals [[/r 2d6]] fire dégâts on a failure, or half dégâts on a success.

Overcharge Tech. The number of charges created increases by two for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Hold Droid.name: Hold Droid
Hold Droid.description:
You emit a paralyzing dart at a droid or construct that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional droid or construct for each slot niveau above 2nd. La cibles must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Squad Shield.name: Squad Shield
Squad Shield.description:
In the face of danger, you create a barrier that protects you and those around you. A faintly glowing sphere of protection with a radius of 10 mètres appears. The sphere lasts for the duration.

Any pouvoir technique (or pouvoir de la Force that deals energy or lightning dégâts) of niveau 7 or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures or objects within it, even if the power is cast using a higher niveau tech slot. Such a power can target creatures and objects within the barrier, but the power has no effect on them. Similarly, the area within the barrier is excluded from the areas affected by such powers.

Furthermore, hazards of the following types cannot physically pass through the barrier or affect anything within it.

  • Physical or energy projectiles.
  • A specific effect, such as a thermal detonator's explosion.
  • An environmental danger, such as falling rocks or a lava flow.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 8 or higher, the maximum radius increases by 10 mètres for each slot niveau above 7th. De plus, the barrier blocks powers of one niveau higher for each slot niveau above 7th.

Shatter.name: Shatter
Shatter.description:
A sudden loud ringing noise, painfully intense, erupts from a point de votre choix within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature made of inorganic material such as stone, crystal, or metal has disavantage on this jet de sauvegarde.

An unenhanced object that isn't being worn or carried also takes the dégâts if it's in the power's area.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Alarm.name: Alarm
Alarm.description:
You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, a window, or an area within range that is no larger than a 20-foot cube. Until the power ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature contactes or enters the warded area. When you cast the power, you can designate creatures that won't set off the alarm. You also choose whether the alarm is mental or audible.

A silent alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if you are within 1 mile of the warded area. This ping awakens you if you are sleeping.

An audible alarm produces the sound of a hand bell for 10 seconds within 60 mètres.

Tactical Barrier.name: Tactical Barrier
Tactical Barrier.description: Un champ scintillant apparaît et entoure une créature de votre choix à portée, lui accordant un bonus de +2 à la CA pour la durée.

Condense/Vaporize.name: Condense/Vaporize
Condense/Vaporize.description:
In an open container, you can create up to 10 gallons of drinkable water. You may also produce a rain that falls within a 30-foot cube and extinguishes open-air flames. You can destroy the same amount of water in an open container, or destroy a 30-foot cube of fog.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the amount of water you can create increases by 10 gallons, or the size of the cube increases by 5 mètres, for each slot niveau above 1st.

Spot the Weakness.name: Repérez la faiblesse
Spot the Weakness.description: Jusqu'à trois créatures de votre choix que vous pouvez voir à portée doivent faire des jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité. La première fois à chaque tour, une cible qui échoue à ce jet de sauvegarde effectue un jet d'attaque ou un jet de sauvegarde avant la fin du pouvoir, la cible doit lancer un [[/r d4]] et soustraire le nombre obtenu du jet d'attaque ou du jet de sauvegarde. emplacement technologique de niveau 3 ou supérieur, vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire tous les deux niveaux d'emplacement au-dessus du 1er. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir au niveau 3, 6 ou 9, le dé augmente respectivement à [[/r d6]], [[/r d8]] et [[/r d10]].

Protection from Energy.name: Protection contre l'énergie
Protection from Energy.description: For the duration, the willing creature you contact has resistance to one type de dégâts de votre choix: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or sonic.

Spectrum Ray.name: Spectrum Ray
Spectrum Ray.description:
You shoot a beam of energy at a creature that you can see within range. You choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or sonic for the type of beam you create, and then make a ranged tech attack against la cible. If the attack hits, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the type you chose.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]) and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Tech Override.name: Tech Override
Tech Override.description:
You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a pouvoir technique. If la créature is casting a power of niveau 3 or lower, its power fails and has no effect. If it is casting a power of niveau 4 or higher, make an test de caractéristique using your techcasting ability. The DD equals 10 + the power's niveau. On a success, la créature's power fails and has no effect.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the interrupted power has no effect if its niveau is less than or equal to the niveau of the tech slot you used.

Tonal Translocate.name: Tonal Translocate
Tonal Translocate.description:
You teleport yourpersonnelle to an unoccupied space you can see within range. Immediately after you disappear, a thunderous boom sounds, and chaque créature within 10 mètres of the space you left must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 3d10]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. The blast can be heard from up to 300 mètres away.

You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also teleport one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 mètres of you when you cast this power, and there must be an unoccupied space within 5 mètres of your destination space for la créature to appear in; otherwise, la créature is left behind.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Translocate.name: Translocate
Translocate.description: Your form shimmers in a holographic configuration, and then collapses. You teleport up to 30 mètres to an unoccupied space that you can see.

Flame Sweep.name: Flame Sweep
Flame Sweep.description:
A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from you. Each creature in a cône de 4,5 mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Stack the Deck.name: Empilez le pont
Stack the Deck.description:
Vous boostez jusqu'à trois créatures de votre choix à portée. Chaque fois qu'une cible effectue un jet d'attaque ou un jet de sauvegarde avant la fin du pouvoir, la cible peut lancer un [[/r d4]] et ajouter le numéro obtenu au jet d'attaque ou au jet de sauvegarde.

Overcharge Tech. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir avec un emplacement technologique de niveau 3 ou supérieur, vous pouvez ciblez une créature supplémentaire tous les deux niveaux d'emplacement au-dessus du 1er. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir au niveau 3, 6 ou 9, le dé augmente respectivement à [[/r d6]], [[/r d8]] et [[/r d10]].

Lesser Mislead.name: Lesser Mislead
Lesser Mislead.description:
You become invisible at the same time that an illusory double of you appears where you are standing. The double lasts jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour, but the invisibility ends if you attack or cast a power.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour move your illusory double up to your speed and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose.

As soon as it is attacked or would take dégâts, the double dissipates.

Spectrum Discharge.name: Spectrum Discharge
Spectrum Discharge.description:
You contact a willing creature, granting it an elemental charge. Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison or sonic. For the duration, a creature can use an action to expel energy of the chosen type in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 3d6]] dégâts of the chosen type on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Toxic Cloud.name: Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of poisonous, yellow-green fog centered on a point you choose within range. The fog spreads around corners. It lasts for the duration or until strong wind disperses the fog, ending the power. Its area is heavily obscured.
