When a creature enters the power's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, cette créature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 5d8]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. Creatures are affected even if they hold their breath or don't need to breathe.

The fog moves 10 mètres away from you at the start of each of your turns, rolling along the surface of the ground. The vapors, being heavier than air, sink to the lowest niveau of the land, even pouring down openings.

Overcharge Tech. When you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 6 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Oil Slick.name: Oil Slick
Oil Slick.description:
You cover the ground in a case de 3 mètres within range in oil. For the duration, it is difficult terrain.

When the oil appears, chaque créature standing in its area must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or fall à terre. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde.

The oil is flammable. Any 5 foot square of the oil exposed to fire burns away in one round. Each creature who enters the fire or starts it turn there must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 3d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Security Protocols.name: Security Protocols
Security Protocols.description:
You create a ward that protects up to 2,500 square mètres of floor space (an area 50 mètres square, or one hundred case de 1,5 mètres or twenty-five case de 3 mètress). The secured area can be up to 20 mètres tall, and shaped as you desire. You can ward several stories of a stronghold by dividing the area among them, as long as you can walk into each contiguous area while you are casting the power.

When you cast this power, you can specify individuals that are unaffected by any or all of the effects that you choose. You can also specify a password that, when spoken aloud, makes the speaker immune to these effects.

When commanded (no action required), security protocols creates the following effects within the secured area.

Corridors. Fog fills all the secured corridors, making them heavily obscured. De plus, at each intersection or branching passage offering a choice of direction, there is a 50 percent chance that a creature other than you will believe it is going in the opposite direction from the one it chooses.

Doors. All doors in the secured area are locked, as if sealed by the lock power. De plus, you can cover up to ten doors with an image (equivalent to the illusory object function of the minor hologram power) to make them appear as plain sections of wall.

Stairs. Electromesh fills all stairs in the secured area from top to bottom, as the electromesh power. This mesh regrows in 10 minutes if it is burned or torn away while security protocols lasts.

Other power effect. You can place your choice of one of the following enhanced effects within the secured area of the stronghold.

  • Place mobile lights in four corridors. You can designate a simple program that the lights repeat as long as security protocols lasts.
  • Place implant message in two locations.
  • Place debilitating gas in two locations. The vapors appear in the places you designate; they return within 10 minutes if dispersed by wind while security protocols lasts.

The whole secured area radiates power. A diminish tech cast on a specific effect, if successful, removes only that effect.

You can create a permanently guarded and secured structure by casting this power there every day for one year.

Bestow Virus.name: Bestow Virus
Bestow Virus.description:
You contact a droid, construct, or a creature with a tech focus, and it must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde or receive a tech-based curse for the duration of the power. When you cast this power, choose the nature of the curse from the following options:

  • Choose one score de caractéristique. While cursed, la cible has disavantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes made with that score de caractéristique.
  • While cursed, la cible has disavantage on attack rolls against you.
  • While cursed, la cible must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde at the start of each of its turns. If it fails, it wastes its action that turn doing nothing.
  • While la cible is cursed, your attacks and powers deal an extra [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts to la cible.

A remove virus power ends this effect. At the GM's discretion, you may choose an alternative curse effect, but it should be no more powerful than those described above. The GM has final say on such a curse's effect.

Overcharge Tech. If you cast this power using a tech slot of niveau 4 or higher, the duration is concentration, up to 10 minutes. If you use a tech slot of niveau 5 or higher, the duration is 8 hours. If you use a tech slot of niveau 7 or higher, the duration is 24 hours. If you use a 9th-niveau tech slot, the power lasts until it is dispelled. Using a tech slot of niveau 5 or higher grants a duration that doesn't require concentration.

Holding Cell.name: Holding Cell
Holding Cell.description:
A sphere of shimmering energy springs into being and encloses a creature or object of Large size or smaller within range. An unwilling creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is enclosed for the duration.

Nothing—not physical objects, energy, or other power effects—can pass through the barrier, in or out, though a creature in the sphere can breathe. The sphere is immune to all dégâts, and a creature or object inside can't be dégâtsd by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a creature inside the sphere dégâts anything outside it.

The sphere is weightless and just large enough to contain la créature or object inside. An enclosed creature can use its action to push against the sphere's walls and thus roll the sphere at up to half la créature's speed. Similarly, the globe can be picked up and moved by other creatures.

A disintegrate power targeting the globe destroys it without harming anything inside it.
